```typescript
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { TaskState } from '../shared';
import { vscode } from '../vscode';

interface Props {
  task: TaskState;
  tasksCols: number;
}

function formatDuration(startMs: number): string {
  const elapsed = Math.max(0, Math.floor((Date.now() - startMs) / 1000));
  const h = Math.floor(elapsed / 3600);
  const m = Math.floor((elapsed % 3600) / 60);
  const s = elapsed % 60;
  if (h > 0) return `${h}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(s).padStart(2, '0')}`;
  return `${String(m).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(s).padStart(2, '0')}`;
}

function calcProgress(task: TaskState): number {
  const total = task.jobs.length;
  if (total === 0) return 0;
  const sum = task.jobs.reduce((acc, j) => {
    if (j.status === 'succeeded' || j.status === 'failed') return acc + 100;
    if (j.status === 'running') return acc + j.progress;
    return acc; // submitting = 0
  }, 0);
  return Math.floor(sum / total);
}

export const TaskCard: React.FC<Props> = ({ task, tasksCols }) => {
  const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState(true);
  const [elapsed, setElapsed] = useState(formatDuration(task.startTime));

  // 逐秒计时
  useEffect(() => {
    const timer = setInterval(() => {
      setElapsed(formatDuration(task.startTime));
    }, 1000);
    return () => clearInterval(timer);
  }, [task.startTime]);

  const doneCount = task.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'succeeded').length;
  const failedCount = task.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'failed').length;
  const submittingCount = task.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'submitting').length;
  const runningCount = task.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'running').length;
  const total = task.jobs.length;

  const progress = calcProgress(task);
  const allDone = total > 0 && task.jobs.every(j => j.status === 'succeeded' || j.status === 'failed');

  const statusLabel = allDone ? `完成 ${doneCount}/${total}` : `生成中 ${doneCount}/${total}`;
  const failLabel = failedCount > 0 ? ` · 失败 ${failedCount}` : '';

  const title = `${task.folderName}（${task.model}） · ${statusLabel}${failLabel} · ${elapsed}`;

  return (
    <div className="task-card">
      <div className="task-card-header" onClick={() => setExpanded(!expanded)}>
        <span className="task-card-title">{title}</span>
        <span className="task-card-toggle">{expanded ? '▾' : '▸'}</span>
      </div>
      {expanded && (
        <div className="task-card-body">
          <div className="progress-bar">
            <div className="progress-fill" style={{ width: `${progress}%` }} />
          </div>
          <span className="progress-text">{progress}%</span>

          {submittingCount > 0 && (
            <p className="task-hint">正在提交 {submittingCount} 个请求…</p>
          )}
          {runningCount > 0 && (
            <p className="task-hint">还有 {runningCount} 张正在生成…</p>
          )}

          {task.jobs.filter(j => j.error).map((j, i) => (
            <p key={i} className="task-error">{j.error}</p>
          ))}

          {/* 已下载图片缩略图 */}
          {task.jobs.some(j => j.results.length > 0) && (
            <div
              className="task-images-grid"
              style={{ gridTemplateColumns: `repeat(${tasksCols}, 1fr)` }}
            >
              {task.jobs.flatMap(j => j.results).map(img => (
                <img
                  key={img}
                  src={img}
                  className="task-thumb"
                  onClick={() => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'openImage', imagePath: img })}
                />
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

```

import React from 'react';
import { vscode } from '../vscode';
import { UserConfig } from '../shared';
import { MaterialPanel, MaterialLib } from './MaterialPanel';

interface Props {
  config: UserConfig;
  activeMd: string;
  materialLibs: MaterialLib[];
  statusText: string;
  statusIsError: boolean;
}

export const WorkbenchTab: React.FC<Props> = ({ config, activeMd, materialLibs, statusText, statusIsError }) => {
  const mdDisplay = activeMd ? activeMd.replace(/^.*[/\\]/, '') : '未打开 Markdown 文件';

  return (
    <div className="workbench-tab">
      {/* 素材库区 */}
      <div className="material-section">
        <MaterialPanel libs={materialLibs} workbenchCols={config.workbenchCols} />
      </div>

      {/* 底部停靠区 */}
      <div className="controls-section">
        <div className="controls-row">
          <div className="control-item">
            <label>模型</label>
            <select
              value={config.model}
              onChange={e => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'setConfig', key: 'model', value: e.target.value })}
            >
              <option value="nano-banana-2">nano-banana-2</option>
              <option value="nano-banana-pro">nano-banana-pro</option>
              <option value="gpt-image-2">gpt-image-2</option>
              <option value="gpt-image-2-vip">gpt-image-2-vip</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div className="control-item">
            <label>分辨率</label>
            <select
              value={config.imageSize}
              onChange={e => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'setConfig', key: 'imageSize', value: e.target.value })}
            >
              <option value="1K">1K</option>
              <option value="2K">2K</option>
              <option value="4K">4K</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div className="control-item">
            <label>比例</label>
            <select
              value={config.aspectRatio}
              onChange={e => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'setConfig', key: 'aspectRatio', value: e.target.value })}
            >
              <option value="1:1">1:1</option>
              <option value="16:9">16:9</option>
              <option value="9:16">9:16</option>
              <option value="4:3">4:3</option>
              <option value="3:4">3:4</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div className="control-item">
            <label>并发数</label>
            <input
              type="number" min={1} max={10}
              value={config.concurrency}
              onChange={e => {
                const v = Number(e.target.value);
                if (v >= 1 && v <= 10) {
                  vscode.postMessage({ type: 'setConfig', key: 'concurrency', value: v });
                }
              }}
            />
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="generate-row">
          <span className="md-name">{mdDisplay}</span>
          <button onClick={() => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'preview' })}>预览请求</button>
          <button onClick={() => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'generate' })}>生成</button>
        </div>

        {statusText && (
          <div className={`status-row ${statusIsError ? 'error' : ''}`}>
            {statusText}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

```

import React from 'react';
import { vscode } from '../vscode';

export interface MaterialLib {
  name: string;
  path: string;
  isManual: boolean;
  images: string[];
}

interface Props {
  libs: MaterialLib[];
  workbenchCols: number;
}

export const MaterialPanel: React.FC<Props> = ({ libs, workbenchCols }) => {
  const handleClick = (imagePath: string) => {
    vscode.postMessage({ type: 'openImage', imagePath });
  };

  const handleContextMenu = (e: React.MouseEvent, imagePath: string) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const fileName = imagePath.replace(/^.*[/\\]/, '').replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '');
    vscode.postMessage({ type: 'insertImage', imagePath, altText: fileName });
  };

  return (
    <div className="material-panel">
      {libs.map(lib => (
        <div key={lib.path} className="material-lib">
          <div className="material-lib-header">
            <span className="material-lib-name">{lib.name}</span>
            {lib.isManual && (
              <button
                className="icon-btn"
                onClick={() => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'removeLib', libPath: lib.path })}
              >
                ✕
              </button>
            )}
          </div>
          <div
            className="material-grid"
            style={{ gridTemplateColumns: `repeat(${workbenchCols}, 1fr)` }}
          >
            {lib.images.map(img => (
              <img
                key={img}
                src={img}
                className="material-thumb"
                onClick={() => handleClick(img)}
                onContextMenu={e => handleContextMenu(e, img)}
                title={img.replace(/^.*[/\\]/, '')}
              />
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      ))}
      <button
        className="add-lib-btn"
        onClick={() => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'addLib' })}
      >
        + 添加
      </button>
    </div>
  );
};

```
</details>

> This is a comment — it doesn't actually implement anything to reset the timeout. The timeout check in poll() uses `task.startTime` which was preserved. So resumed tasks could be immediately timed out if they started more than 10 minutes ago.

But also says "缩略图点击用 VS Code 打开原图" — the TaskCard calls `vscode.postMessage({ type: 'openImage', imagePath: img })`. But the img value here has already been converted to a webview URI by `convertTaskImageUris`. So `handleOpenImage` in sidebarProvider receives a webview URI and tries to open it with `vscode.open(vscode.Uri.file(imagePath))`. This would fail because the webview URI is not a valid file system path.

> This is a BUG. The image path is a webview URI, but `handleOpenImage` tries to open it as a file URI. The webview URI like `https://file+.vscode-resource.vscode-cdn.net/path/to/file` would fail when treated as a file URI.
>

> For the src attribute, webview URI is needed. For opening, the original file path is needed.

The MaterialPanel gets images from `getCurrentMaterialLibs()` which converts all paths to webview URIs. Then when inserted via `handleInsertImage`, the `imagePath` parameter is a webview URI. But `handleInsertImage` computes a relative path using `path.relative(mdDir, imagePath)` — which would compute the relative path from a webview URI, giving a garbage result.

+  const handleGenerate = () => {
+    setGenerating(true);
+    setTimeout(() => setGenerating(false), 5000);
+    vscode.postMessage({ type: 'generate' });
+  };
```

# image-flow VS Code 扩展 M1~M8 实施计划

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** 从零开发 image-flow VS Code 扩展，在 Markdown 文件中通过 Grsai API 生成 AI 图片，含侧栏管理、素材库、预览等完整功能。

**Architecture:** TypeScript VS Code 扩展，扩展主进程（CommonJS）处理所有后端逻辑（API 调用、任务调度、文件 I/O、配置管理），React Webview 侧栏（IIFE）提供 UI。主进程与 webview 通过 postMessage 双向通信，共享类型定义集中在 `src/shared.ts`。

**Tech Stack:** TypeScript, esbuild, React 19, Radix UI, VS Code Extension API, @vscode/test-cli (mocha)

---

- [ ] **Step 1: 创建 esbuild.config.mjs**

```javascript
import * as esbuild from 'esbuild';
import { readFileSync } from 'fs';

const production = process.argv.includes('--production');
const watch = process.argv.includes('--watch');

/** @type {esbuild.BuildOptions} */
const extensionConfig = {
  entryPoints: ['src/extension.ts'],
  bundle: true,
  external: ['vscode'],
  format: 'cjs',
  platform: 'node',
  target: 'ES2022',
  outfile: 'dist/extension.js',
  sourcemap: !production,
  minify: production
};

/** @type {esbuild.BuildOptions} */
const sidebarConfig = {
  entryPoints: ['webview-src/index.tsx'],
  bundle: true,
  format: 'iife',
  platform: 'browser',
  target: 'ES2022',
  outfile: 'media/sidebar.js',
  sourcemap: !production,
  minify: production,
  globalName: 'ImageFlowSidebar'
};

async function main() {
  if (watch) {
    const extCtx = await esbuild.context(extensionConfig);
    const sideCtx = await esbuild.context(sidebarConfig);
    await extCtx.watch();
    await sideCtx.watch();
    console.log('[esbuild] watching...');
  } else {
    await esbuild.build(extensionConfig);
    await esbuild.build(sidebarConfig);
    console.log('[esbuild] build complete');
  }
}

main().catch((e) => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); });
```

### Task 3: 共享类型定义

**Files:**

- [ ] **Step 1: 创建 src/shared.ts**

```typescript
// ========== 消息类型（extension ↔ webview） ==========

export type ExtMessage =
  | { type: 'init'; activeMd: string; config: UserConfig; tasks: TaskState[]; history: HistoryEntry[] }
  | { type: 'configUpdate'; config: UserConfig }
  | { type: 'taskUpdate'; tasks: TaskState[]; history: HistoryEntry[] }
  | { type: 'statusMessage'; text: string; isError: boolean };

export type WebviewMessage =
  | { type: 'init' }
  | { type: 'setApiKey'; value: string }
  | { type: 'setConfig'; key: string; value: unknown }
  | { type: 'generate' }
  | { type: 'preview' }
  | { type: 'insertImage'; imagePath: string; altText: string }
  | { type: 'openImage'; imagePath: string };

// ========== 用户配置 ==========

export interface UserConfig {
  apiKey: string;           // 仅用于判断是否已设置，不传递明文
  baseUrl: string;
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number;
  workbenchCols: number;
  tasksCols: number;
  modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
}

// ========== 任务状态 ==========

export type JobStatus = 'submitting' | 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed';

export interface JobState {
  id: string;               // job id（submitting 时可空）
  status: JobStatus;
  progress: number;         // 0~100
  error: string;
  results: string[];        // 已下载本地图片路径
}

export interface TaskState {
  folderName: string;       // task-<timestamp>-<seq>
  model: string;
  mdFile: string;
  startTime: number;        // 真实开始时间戳 ms
  jobs: JobState[];
  downloadIndex: number;    // 下一个下载图片序号（任务内接续编号）
}

export interface HistoryEntry {
  folderName: string;
  imageCount: number;
  images: string[];         // 缩略图路径列表
}

// ========== 解析结果 ==========

export interface ParseResult {
  finalPrompt: string;
  referenceImages: { index: number; dataUri: string; originalPath: string }[];
}

// ========== API 响应类型（运行时校验用） ==========

export interface ApiGenerateResponse {
  id?: string;
  status?: string;
  results?: { url?: string }[];
  progress?: number;
  error?: string;
}

export interface ApiResultResponse {
  id?: string;
  status?: string;
  results?: { url?: string }[];
  progress?: number;
  error?: string;
}
```

### Task 4: Markdown 解析器

**Files:**
- Create: `src/markdownParser.ts`

- [ ] **Step 1: 创建 src/markdownParser.ts**

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { ParseResult } from './shared';

// 匹配 ![alt](path) 或 ![alt](<path with spaces>)
const IMAGE_RE = /!\[([^\]]*)\]\(<?([^)>]*?)>?\)/g;

interface ImageRef {
  fullMatch: string;
  alt: string;
  path: string;
}

export function parseMarkdownImages(text: string): ImageRef[] {
  const refs: ImageRef[] = [];
  let m: RegExpExecArray | null;
  IMAGE_RE.lastIndex = 0;
  while ((m = IMAGE_RE.exec(text)) !== null) {
    refs.push({ fullMatch: m[0], alt: m[1], path: m[2] });
  }
  return refs;
}

export function resolveAndValidateImages(
  refs: ImageRef[],
  mdDir: string
): { dataUris: string[]; dedupMap: Map<string, number>; errors: string[] } {
  const dedupMap = new Map<string, number>(); // path -> index
  const dataUris: string[] = [];
  const errors: string[] = [];
  let nextIndex = 0;

  for (const ref of refs) {
    if (dedupMap.has(ref.path)) {
      continue; // 去重
    }
    const absPath = path.resolve(mdDir, ref.path);
    try {
      const buffer = fs.readFileSync(absPath);
      const ext = path.extname(absPath).toLowerCase().slice(1);
      const mime = getMimeType(ext);
      const dataUri = `data:${mime};base64,${buffer.toString('base64')}`;
      dedupMap.set(ref.path, nextIndex);
      dataUris.push(dataUri);
      nextIndex++;
    } catch {
      errors.push(ref.path);
    }
  }

  return { dataUris, dedupMap, errors };
}

export function replaceImageRefs(text: string, dedupMap: Map<string, number>): string {
  let result = text;
  IMAGE_RE.lastIndex = 0;
  result = result.replace(IMAGE_RE, (_full, _alt, p) => {
    const index = dedupMap.get(p);
    if (index === undefined) return _full;
    const fileName = p.replace(/^.*[/\\]/, '').replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '');
    return `[image${index + 1}](${fileName})`;
  });
  return result;
}

function getMimeType(ext: string): string {
  const mimeMap: Record<string, string> = {
    png: 'image/png',
    jpg: 'image/jpeg',
    jpeg: 'image/jpeg',
    gif: 'image/gif',
    webp: 'image/webp',
    bmp: 'image/bmp',
    svg: 'image/svg+xml'
  };
  return mimeMap[ext] || 'image/png';
}

export function parseMarkdownFile(mdUri: vscode.Uri): ParseResult {
  const content = fs.readFileSync(mdUri.fsPath, 'utf-8');
  const trimmed = content.trim();
  if (!trimmed) {
    throw new Error('内容为空');
  }

  const refs = parseMarkdownImages(content);
  const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
  const { dataUris, dedupMap, errors } = resolveAndValidateImages(refs, mdDir);

  if (errors.length > 0) {
    throw new Error(`参考图读取失败：\n${errors.join('\n')}`);
  }

  const replaced = replaceImageRefs(content, dedupMap);

  return {
    finalPrompt: replaced,
    referenceImages: dataUris.map((dataUri, i) => ({
      index: i,
      dataUri,
      originalPath: refs.filter((r, idx) => refs.findIndex(r2 => r2.path === r.path) === idx)[i]?.path || ''
    }))
  };
}
```

### Task 5: API 客户端

**Files:**
- Create: `src/apiClient.ts`

- [ ] **Step 1: 创建 src/apiClient.ts**

```typescript
import { ApiGenerateResponse, ApiResultResponse } from './shared';

const TIMEOUT_MS = 30_000;

function controller(): AbortController {
  const c = new AbortController();
  setTimeout(() => c.abort(), TIMEOUT_MS);
  return c;
}

// gpt-image-2-vip 像素换算表
export const VIP_PIXELS: Record<string, Record<string, string>> = {
  '1:1': { '1K': '1024x1024', '2K': '2048x2048', '4K': '2880x2880' },
  '16:9': { '1K': '1792x1024', '2K': '2688x1536', '4K': '3840x2160' },
  '9:16': { '1K': '1024x1792', '2K': '1536x2688', '4K': '2160x3840' },
  '4:3': { '1K': '1536x1152', '2K': '2304x1728', '4K': '3456x2592' },
  '3:4': { '1K': '864x1152', '2K': '1728x2304', '4K': '2592x3456' }
};

export function getAspectRatioValue(
  model: string, aspectRatio: string, imageSize: string
): { aspectRatio?: string; imageSize?: string } {
  if (model.startsWith('nano-banana')) {
    return { aspectRatio, imageSize };
  }
  if (model === 'gpt-image-2') {
    return { aspectRatio };
  }
  if (model === 'gpt-image-2-vip') {
    const pixels = VIP_PIXELS[aspectRatio]?.[imageSize] || '864x1152';
    return { aspectRatio: pixels };
  }
  return { aspectRatio, imageSize };
}

export interface GenerateRequest {
  baseUrl: string;
  apiKey: string;
  model: string;
  prompt: string;
  images: string[];
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  replyType: 'json' | 'async';
}

export async function submitGenerate(req: GenerateRequest): Promise<string> {
  const body: Record<string, unknown> = {
    model: req.model,
    prompt: req.prompt,
    images: req.images,
    replyType: req.replyType
  };

  const sizeFields = getAspectRatioValue(req.model, req.aspectRatio, req.imageSize);
  if (sizeFields.aspectRatio) body.aspectRatio = sizeFields.aspectRatio;
  if (sizeFields.imageSize) body.imageSize = sizeFields.imageSize;

  const resp = await fetch(`${req.baseUrl}/v1/api/generate`, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: {
      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      'Authorization': `Bearer ${req.apiKey}`
    },
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
    signal: controller().signal
  });

  if (!resp.ok) {
    throw new Error(`API 返回 HTTP ${resp.status}`);
  }

  const data: ApiGenerateResponse = await resp.json();
  if (!data.id || data.status === 'failed' || data.status === 'violation') {
    throw new Error(data.error || `生成提交失败：${data.status || '无 id'}`);
  }

  return data.id;
}

export async function pollResult(baseUrl: string, apiKey: string, jobId: string): Promise<ApiResultResponse> {
  const url = `${baseUrl}/v1/api/result?id=${encodeURIComponent(jobId)}`;
  const resp = await fetch(url, {
    headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiKey}` },
    signal: controller().signal
  });

  if (!resp.ok) {
    throw new Error(`查询 API 返回 HTTP ${resp.status}`);
  }

  const data: ApiResultResponse = await resp.json();
  return data;
}

export async function downloadImage(url: string, destPath: string): Promise<void> {
  const resp = await fetch(url, { signal: controller().signal });
  if (!resp.ok) {
    throw new Error(`下载图片 HTTP ${resp.status}`);
  }
  const buffer = Buffer.from(await resp.arrayBuffer());
  const fs = await import('fs');
  fs.writeFileSync(destPath, buffer);
}
```

```

### Task 6: 扩展入口 + 生成命令（同步版）

**Files:**
- Create: `src/extension.ts`

- [ ] **Step 1: 创建 src/extension.ts**

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { parseMarkdownFile } from './markdownParser';
import { submitGenerate, downloadImage } from './apiClient';

export function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {
  // 生成命令
  const genCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.generateImage', async (uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
    const mdUri = uri || vscode.window.activeTextEditor?.document.uri;
    if (!mdUri || !mdUri.fsPath.endsWith('.md')) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请选中一个 Markdown 文件');
      return;
    }

    const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('image-flow');
    const apiKey = await context.secrets.get('image-flow.apiKey');
    if (!apiKey) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先设置 API Key（侧栏设置页）');
      return;
    }

    try {
      // 解析 Markdown
      const parsed = parseMarkdownFile(mdUri);

      // 组装请求体
      const model = config.get<string>('model', 'nano-banana-2');
      const baseUrl = config.get<string>('baseUrl', 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn');
      const aspectRatio = config.get<string>('aspectRatio', '3:4');
      const imageSize = config.get<string>('imageSize', '1K');
      const concurrency = config.get<number>('concurrency', 1);

      const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
      const mdName = path.basename(mdUri.fsPath, '.md');

      // 创建任务文件夹
      const now = new Date();
      const ts = `${String(now.getFullYear()).slice(2)}${pad(now.getMonth() + 1)}${pad(now.getDate())}${pad(now.getHours())}${pad(now.getMinutes())}${pad(now.getSeconds())}`;
      const taskFolder = findAvailableTaskFolder(mdDir, ts);
      fs.mkdirSync(path.join(mdDir, taskFolder), { recursive: true });

      const images = parsed.referenceImages.map(r => r.dataUri);

      // 并发提交 N 个请求
      const promises: Promise<string>[] = [];
      for (let i = 0; i < concurrency; i++) {
        promises.push(submitGenerate({
          baseUrl, apiKey, model,
          prompt: parsed.finalPrompt,
          images,
          aspectRatio, imageSize,
          replyType: 'json' // M1 用同步模式
        }));
      }

      const results = await Promise.allSettled(promises);
      const failures: string[] = [];
      let downloadIdx = 0;

      for (const result of results) {
        if (result.status === 'rejected') {
          failures.push(String(result.reason));
          continue;
        }

        // 同步模式：submitGenerate 返回的 id 即带 results
        // 此处按同步成功处理；下载逻辑在 M3 完善
        downloadIdx++;
      }

      if (failures.length === concurrency) {
        fs.rmdirSync(path.join(mdDir, taskFolder));
        throw new Error(failures.join('\n'));
      }

      vscode.window.showInformationMessage(`生成完成，任务文件夹：${taskFolder}`);
    } catch (e) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)}`);
    }
  });

  // 预览命令（M5 实现，先占位）
  const previewCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', async (uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
    vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览功能将在 M5 实现');
  });

  context.subscriptions.push(genCmd, previewCmd);
}

function pad(n: number): string {
  return String(n).padStart(2, '0');
}

function findAvailableTaskFolder(mdDir: string, ts: string): string {
  let seq = 1;
  while (true) {
    const name = `task-${ts}-${seq}`;
    if (!fs.existsSync(path.join(mdDir, name))) return name;
    seq++;
  }
}

export function deactivate() {}
```

### Task 8: 配置管理模块

**Files:**
- Create: `src/config.ts`

- [ ] **Step 1: 创建 src/config.ts**

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import { UserConfig } from './shared';

export class ConfigManager {
  private static GLOBAL_KEY = 'image-flow.config';

  constructor(private secrets: vscode.SecretStorage, private globalState: vscode.Memento) {}

  async getApiKey(): Promise<string> {
    return (await this.secrets.get('image-flow.apiKey')) || '';
  }

  async setApiKey(value: string): Promise<void> {
    if (value) {
      await this.secrets.store('image-flow.apiKey', value);
    } else {
      await this.secrets.delete('image-flow.apiKey');
    }
  }

  getAll(): UserConfig {
    const saved = this.globalState.get<Partial<UserConfig>>(ConfigManager.GLOBAL_KEY) || {};
    return {
      apiKey: '', // 不返回明文
      baseUrl: saved.baseUrl || 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn',
      model: saved.model || 'nano-banana-2',
      aspectRatio: saved.aspectRatio || '3:4',
      imageSize: saved.imageSize || '1K',
      concurrency: saved.concurrency || 1,
      workbenchCols: saved.workbenchCols || 4,
      tasksCols: saved.tasksCols || 2,
      modelInjections: saved.modelInjections || {}
    };
  }

  async update(key: keyof UserConfig, value: unknown): Promise<void> {
    if (key === 'apiKey') {
      await this.setApiKey(value as string);
      return;
    }
    const saved = this.globalState.get<Partial<UserConfig>>(ConfigManager.GLOBAL_KEY) || {};
    (saved as Record<string, unknown>)[key] = value;
    await this.globalState.update(ConfigManager.GLOBAL_KEY, saved);
  }
}
```

### Task 9: 侧栏 Webview Provider（后端）

**Files:**
- Create: `src/sidebarProvider.ts`

- [ ] **Step 1: 创建 src/sidebarProvider.ts**

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import { ConfigManager } from './config';
import { ExtMessage, WebviewMessage, UserConfig, TaskState, HistoryEntry } from './shared';

export class SidebarProvider implements vscode.WebviewViewProvider {
  private _view?: vscode.WebviewView;

  constructor(
    private readonly extensionUri: vscode.Uri,
    private readonly configManager: ConfigManager
  ) {}

  resolveWebviewView(webviewView: vscode.WebviewView): void {
    this._view = webviewView;

    webviewView.webview.options = {
      enableScripts: true,
      localResourceRoots: [vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.extensionUri, 'media')]
    };

    webviewView.webview.html = this.getHtml(webviewView.webview);

    webviewView.webview.onDidReceiveMessage(async (msg: WebviewMessage) => {
      switch (msg.type) {
        case 'init':
          await this.pushInit();
          break;
        case 'setApiKey':
          await this.configManager.setApiKey(msg.value);
          break;
        case 'setConfig':
          await this.configManager.update(msg.key as keyof UserConfig, msg.value);
          break;
        case 'generate':
          await vscode.commands.executeCommand('image-flow.generateImage');
          break;
        case 'preview':
          await vscode.commands.executeCommand('image-flow.previewRequest');
          break;
        case 'insertImage':
          // M4 实现
          break;
        case 'openImage':
          // M4 实现
          break;
      }
    });
  }

  postMessage(msg: ExtMessage): void {
    this._view?.webview.postMessage(msg);
  }

  private async pushInit(): Promise<void> {
    const config = this.configManager.getAll();
    const activeEditor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
    const activeMd = activeEditor?.document.uri.fsPath.endsWith('.md')
      ? activeEditor.document.uri.fsPath : '';

    this.postMessage({
      type: 'init',
      activeMd,
      config,
      tasks: [],    // M3 填充
      history: []   // M4 填充
    });
  }

  private getHtml(webview: vscode.Webview): string {
    const nonce = getNonce();
    const scriptUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.js')
    );
    const styleUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.css')
    );

    return `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy"
        content="default-src 'none'; img-src ${webview.cspSource} data:; script-src 'nonce-${nonce}'; style-src ${webview.cspSource} 'unsafe-inline';">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="${styleUri}">
</head>
<body>
  <div id="root"></div>
  <script nonce="${nonce}" src="${scriptUri}"></script>
</body>
</html>`;
  }
}

function getNonce(): string {
  let text = '';
  const possible = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789';
  for (let i = 0; i < 32; i++) {
    text += possible.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * possible.length));
  }
  return text;
}
```

```typescript
// 与 src/shared.ts 保持同步的前端类型副本
export type ExtMessage =
  | { type: 'init'; activeMd: string; config: UserConfig; tasks: TaskState[]; history: HistoryEntry[] }
  | { type: 'configUpdate'; config: UserConfig }
  | { type: 'taskUpdate'; tasks: TaskState[]; history: HistoryEntry[] }
  | { type: 'statusMessage'; text: string; isError: boolean };

export type WebviewMessage =
  | { type: 'init' }
  | { type: 'setApiKey'; value: string }
  | { type: 'setConfig'; key: string; value: unknown }
  | { type: 'generate' }
  | { type: 'preview' }
  | { type: 'insertImage'; imagePath: string; altText: string }
  | { type: 'openImage'; imagePath: string };

export interface UserConfig {
  apiKey: string; baseUrl: string; model: string; aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string; concurrency: number; workbenchCols: number;
  tasksCols: number; modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
}

export interface JobState {
  id: string; status: string; progress: number; error: string; results: string[];
}

export interface TaskState {
  folderName: string; model: string; mdFile: string;
  startTime: number; jobs: JobState[]; downloadIndex: number;
}

export interface HistoryEntry {
  folderName: string; imageCount: number; images: string[];
}

```tsx
import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { vscode } from './vscode';
import { ExtMessage, UserConfig, TaskState, HistoryEntry } from './shared';
import { WorkbenchTab } from './components/WorkbenchTab';
import { TasksTab } from './components/TasksTab';
import { SettingsTab } from './components/SettingsTab';

type TabName = 'workbench' | 'tasks' | 'settings';

export const App: React.FC = () => {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<TabName>('workbench');
  const [config, setConfig] = useState<UserConfig | null>(null);
  const [activeMd, setActiveMd] = useState('');
  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState<TaskState[]>([]);
  const [history, setHistory] = useState<HistoryEntry[]>([]);
  const [statusText, setStatusText] = useState('');
  const [statusIsError, setStatusIsError] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = (e: MessageEvent<ExtMessage>) => {
      const msg = e.data;
      switch (msg.type) {
        case 'init':
          setConfig(msg.config);
          setActiveMd(msg.activeMd);
          setTasks(msg.tasks);
          setHistory(msg.history);
          break;
        case 'configUpdate':
          setConfig(msg.config);
          break;
        case 'taskUpdate':
          setTasks(msg.tasks);
          setHistory(msg.history);
          break;
        case 'statusMessage':
          setStatusText(msg.text);
          setStatusIsError(msg.isError);
          break;
      }
    };
    window.addEventListener('message', handler);
    vscode.postMessage({ type: 'init' });
    return () => window.removeEventListener('message', handler);
  }, []);

  const tabs: { id: TabName; label: string }[] = [
    { id: 'workbench', label: '工作台' },
    { id: 'tasks', label: '任务' },
    { id: 'settings', label: '设置' }
  ];

  return (
    <div className="app">
      <div className="tab-bar">
        {tabs.map(t => (
          <button
            key={t.id}
            className={`tab-btn ${activeTab === t.id ? 'active' : ''}`}
            onClick={() => setActiveTab(t.id)}
          >
            {t.label}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>
      <div className="tab-content">
        {activeTab === 'workbench' && config && (
          <WorkbenchTab config={config} activeMd={activeMd} statusText={statusText} statusIsError={statusIsError} />
        )}
        {activeTab === 'tasks' && (
          <TasksTab tasks={tasks} history={history} tasksCols={config?.tasksCols || 2} />
        )}
        {activeTab === 'settings' && config && (
          <SettingsTab config={config} />
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};
```

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { vscode } from '../vscode';
import { UserConfig } from '../shared';

interface Props {
  config: UserConfig;
}

export const SettingsTab: React.FC<Props> = ({ config }) => {
  const [apiKey, setApiKey] = useState('');
  const [showKey, setShowKey] = useState(false);

  const openApiKeyUrl = () => {
    vscode.postMessage({ type: 'openUrl', url: 'https://grsai.ai/zh/dashboard/api-keys' });
  };

  return (
    <div className="settings-tab">
      <section className="setting-group">
        <label className="setting-label">API Key</label>
        <div className="setting-row">
          <input
            type={showKey ? 'text' : 'password'}
            value={apiKey}
            onChange={e => setApiKey(e.target.value)}
            onBlur={() => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'setApiKey', value: apiKey })}
            placeholder="sk-..."
            className="setting-input"
          />
          <button onClick={() => setShowKey(!showKey)} className="icon-btn">
            {showKey ? '隐藏' : '显示'}
          </button>
          <button onClick={openApiKeyUrl} className="link-btn">获取 API Key →</button>
        </div>
      </section>

      <section className="setting-group">
        <label className="setting-label">节点</label>
        <select
          value={config.baseUrl}
          onChange={e => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'setConfig', key: 'baseUrl', value: e.target.value })}
          className="setting-select"
        >
          <option value="https://grsai.dakka.com.cn">国内节点</option>
          <option value="https://grsaiapi.com">全球节点</option>
        </select>
      </section>

      <section className="setting-group">
        <label className="setting-label">工作台每行张数</label>
        <input
          type="number" min={1} max={8}
          value={config.workbenchCols}
          onChange={e => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'setConfig', key: 'workbenchCols', value: Number(e.target.value) })}
          className="setting-input"
        />
      </section>

      <section className="setting-group">
        <label className="setting-label">任务栏每行张数</label>
        <input
          type="number" min={1} max={8}
          value={config.tasksCols}
          onChange={e => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'setConfig', key: 'tasksCols', value: Number(e.target.value) })}
          className="setting-input"
        />
      </section>

      <section className="setting-group">
        <label className="setting-label">模型注入提示词</label>
        <select
          value={config.model}
          onChange={e => {}} // 独立选择，不影响工作台；仅用于确定显示哪个模型的注入句
          className="setting-select"
        >
          <option value="nano-banana-2">nano-banana-2</option>
          <option value="nano-banana-pro">nano-banana-pro</option>
          <option value="gpt-image-2">gpt-image-2</option>

          value={config.modelInjections[config.model] || ''}
          onChange={e => vscode.postMessage({
            type: 'setConfig',
            key: 'modelInjections',

          })}
          className="setting-textarea"
          rows={3}
          placeholder="该模型的注入提示词…"
        />
      </section>
    </div>
  );
};

import React from 'react';
import { vscode } from '../vscode';
import { UserConfig } from '../shared';

interface Props {
  config: UserConfig;
  activeMd: string;
  statusText: string;
  statusIsError: boolean;
}

export const WorkbenchTab: React.FC<Props> = ({ config, activeMd, statusText, statusIsError }) => {
  const mdDisplay = activeMd ? activeMd.replace(/^.*[/\\]/, '') : '未打开 Markdown 文件';

  return (
    <div className="workbench-tab">
      {/* 素材库区 — M4 填充 */}
      <div className="material-section">
        <p className="placeholder-text">素材库将在 M4 实现</p>
      </div>

      {/* 底部停靠区 */}
      <div className="controls-section">
        <div className="controls-row">
          <div className="control-item">
            <label>模型</label>
            <select
              value={config.model}
              onChange={e => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'setConfig', key: 'model', value: e.target.value })}
            >
              <option value="nano-banana-2">nano-banana-2</option>
              <option value="nano-banana-pro">nano-banana-pro</option>
              <option value="gpt-image-2">gpt-image-2</option>
              <option value="gpt-image-2-vip">gpt-image-2-vip</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div className="control-item">
            <label>分辨率</label>
            <select
              value={config.imageSize}
              onChange={e => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'setConfig', key: 'imageSize', value: e.target.value })}
            >
              <option value="1K">1K</option>
              <option value="2K">2K</option>
              <option value="4K">4K</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div className="control-item">
            <label>比例</label>
            <select
              value={config.aspectRatio}
              onChange={e => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'setConfig', key: 'aspectRatio', value: e.target.value })}
            >
              <option value="1:1">1:1</option>
              <option value="16:9">16:9</option>
              <option value="9:16">9:16</option>
              <option value="4:3">4:3</option>
              <option value="3:4">3:4</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div className="control-item">
            <label>并发数</label>
            <input
              type="number" min={1} max={10}
              value={config.concurrency}
              onChange={e => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'setConfig', key: 'concurrency', value: Number(e.target.value) })}
            />
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="generate-row">
          <span className="md-name">{mdDisplay}</span>
          <button onClick={() => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'preview' })}>预览请求</button>
          <button onClick={() => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'generate' })}>生成</button>
        </div>

        {statusText && (
          <div className={`status-row ${statusIsError ? 'error' : ''}`}>
            {statusText}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

- [ ] **Step 1: 创建 src/imageUtils.ts**

```typescript
export const IMAGE_EXTENSIONS = ['png', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'gif', 'webp', 'bmp', 'svg'];

export function isImageExt(ext: string): boolean {
  return IMAGE_EXTENSIONS.includes(ext.toLowerCase());
}

export function extFromUrl(url: string): string {
  try {
    const pathname = new URL(url).pathname;
    const ext = pathname.split('.').pop()?.toLowerCase() || '';
    return isImageExt(ext) ? ext : 'png';
  } catch {
    return 'png';
  }
}

export function mimeFromExt(ext: string): string {
  const map: Record<string, string> = {
    png: 'image/png', jpg: 'image/jpeg', jpeg: 'image/jpeg',
    gif: 'image/gif', webp: 'image/webp', bmp: 'image/bmp', svg: 'image/svg+xml'
  };
  return map[ext] || 'image/png';
}
```

### Task 15: 任务管理器

**Files:**
- Create: `src/taskManager.ts`

- [ ] **Step 1: 创建 src/taskManager.ts**

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { TaskState, JobState, JobStatus } from './shared';
import { submitGenerate, pollResult, downloadImage, POLL_INTERVAL_MS, TASK_TIMEOUT_MS } from './apiClient';
import { extFromUrl } from './imageUtils';

export class TaskManager {
  private tasks: TaskState[] = [];
  private pollTimer: ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | null = null;
  private polling = false; // 重入锁
  private onUpdate?: (tasks: TaskState[]) => void;

  constructor(private globalState: vscode.Memento, private secrets: vscode.SecretStorage) {}

  setOnUpdate(cb: (tasks: TaskState[]) => void): void {
    this.onUpdate = cb;
  }

  getTasks(): TaskState[] {
    return this.tasks;
  }

  addTask(task: TaskState): void {
    this.tasks.unshift(task);
    this.save();
    this.notify();
    this.ensurePolling();
  }

  removeTask(folderName: string): void {
    this.tasks = this.tasks.filter(t => t.folderName !== folderName);
    this.save();
    this.notify();
    if (this.tasks.length === 0) this.stopPolling();
  }

  async submitJobs(
    task: TaskState,
    baseUrl: string,
    apiKey: string,
    model: string,
    prompt: string,
    images: string[],
    aspectRatio: string,
    imageSize: string,
    concurrency: number
  ): Promise<void> {
    const promises: Promise<void>[] = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < concurrency; i++) {
      const job: JobState = { id: '', status: 'submitting', progress: 0, error: '', results: [] };
      task.jobs.push(job);
      const jobIndex = task.jobs.length - 1;

      const p = submitGenerate({
        baseUrl, apiKey, model, prompt, images,
        aspectRatio, imageSize, replyType: 'async'
      }).then(jobId => {
        job.id = jobId;
        job.status = 'running';
        this.save();
        this.notify();
      }).catch(e => {
        job.status = 'failed';
        job.error = String(e);
        this.save();
        this.notify();
      });

      promises.push(p);
    }

    this.save();
    this.notify();

    await Promise.allSettled(promises);

    // 全部提交失败 → 作废任务
    if (task.jobs.every(j => j.status === 'failed')) {
      const errors = [...new Set(task.jobs.map(j => j.error).filter(Boolean))];
      this.removeTask(task.folderName);
      const mdDir = path.dirname(task.mdFile);
      try { fs.rmdirSync(path.join(mdDir, task.folderName)); } catch {}
      throw new Error(errors.join('\n'));
    }
  }

  private async poll(): Promise<void> {
    if (this.polling) return;
    this.polling = true;

    try {
      const apiKey = await this.secrets.get('image-flow.apiKey');
      if (!apiKey) return;

      const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('image-flow');
      const baseUrl = config.get<string>('baseUrl', 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn');

      for (const task of this.tasks) {
        const mdDir = path.dirname(task.mdFile);
        const mdName = path.basename(task.mdFile, '.md');
        const taskDir = path.join(mdDir, task.folderName);

        for (const job of task.jobs) {
          if (job.status !== 'running') continue;

          try {
            const result = await pollResult(baseUrl, apiKey, job.id);
            if (result.status === 'succeeded' && result.results) {
              for (const r of result.results) {
                if (r.url) {
                  task.downloadIndex++;
                  const ext = extFromUrl(r.url);
                  const fileName = `${mdName}-${task.downloadIndex}.${ext}`;
                  const destPath = path.join(taskDir, fileName);
                  await downloadImage(r.url, destPath);
                  job.results.push(destPath);
                }
              }
              job.status = 'succeeded';
              job.progress = 100;
            } else if (result.status === 'failed' || result.status === 'violation') {
              job.status = 'failed';
              job.error = result.error || result.status;
            } else if (result.status === 'running') {
              job.progress = result.progress || 0;
            }
          } catch {
            // 瞬时错误：保持 running 状态，下轮重试
          }
        }

        // 超时检查
        const now = Date.now();
        if (now - task.startTime > TASK_TIMEOUT_MS) {
          for (const job of task.jobs) {
            if (job.status === 'running' || job.status === 'submitting') {
              job.status = 'failed';
              job.error = '任务超时';
            }
          }
        }
      }

      // 清理已终结任务
      const toRemove: string[] = [];
      for (const task of this.tasks) {
        if (task.jobs.every(j => j.status === 'succeeded' || j.status === 'failed')) {
          const hasImages = task.jobs.some(j => j.results.length > 0);
          if (hasImages) {
            const failedCount = task.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'failed').length;
            if (failedCount > 0) {
              vscode.window.showWarningMessage(
                `任务 ${task.folderName}：${task.jobs.length - failedCount}/${task.jobs.length} 成功，${failedCount} 失败`
              );
            }
          } else {
            vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`任务 ${task.folderName}：全部生成失败`);
            try { fs.rmdirSync(path.join(path.dirname(task.mdFile), task.folderName)); } catch {}
          }
          toRemove.push(task.folderName);
        }
      }

      for (const name of toRemove) {
        this.tasks = this.tasks.filter(t => t.folderName !== name);
      }

      if (this.tasks.length === 0) this.stopPolling();

      this.save();
      this.notify();
    } finally {
      this.polling = false;
    }
  }

  resume(): void {
    // 从 globalState 恢复
    const saved = this.globalState.get<TaskState[]>('image-flow.tasks') || [];
    this.tasks = saved;

    // submitting 态无 id → 判失败
    let hasRunning = false;
    for (const task of this.tasks) {
      for (const job of task.jobs) {
        if (job.status === 'submitting') {
          job.status = 'failed';
          job.error = '提交未完成';
        }
        if (job.status === 'running') hasRunning = true;
      }
    }

    if (hasRunning) {
      this.ensurePolling();
      // 立即拉一次
      this.poll();
    }

    this.notify();
  }

  private ensurePolling(): void {
    if (!this.pollTimer) {
      this.pollTimer = setInterval(() => this.poll(), POLL_INTERVAL_MS);
    }
  }

  private stopPolling(): void {
    if (this.pollTimer) {
      clearInterval(this.pollTimer);
      this.pollTimer = null;
    }
  }

  private save(): void {
    this.globalState.update('image-flow.tasks', this.tasks);
  }

  private notify(): void {
    this.onUpdate?.(this.tasks);
  }
}
```

### Task 16: 集成任务管理器到扩展入口

**Files:**

- [ ] **Step 1: 更新 extension.ts**

将生成命令改为异步模式，委托给 TaskManager：

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { ConfigManager } from './config';
import { SidebarProvider } from './sidebarProvider';
import { TaskManager } from './taskManager';
import { TaskState } from './shared';
import { parseMarkdownFile } from './markdownParser';

let sidebarProvider: SidebarProvider;
let taskManager: TaskManager;

export function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {
  const configManager = new ConfigManager(context.secrets, context.globalState);
  sidebarProvider = new SidebarProvider(context.extensionUri, configManager);
  taskManager = new TaskManager(context.globalState, context.secrets);

  // 任务状态变更 → 推 webview
  taskManager.setOnUpdate((tasks) => {
    sidebarProvider.pushTasks(tasks);
  });

  // 侧栏
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.window.registerWebviewViewProvider('image-flow.sidebar', sidebarProvider)
  );

  // 生成命令
  const genCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.generateImage', async (uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
    const mdUri = uri || vscode.window.activeTextEditor?.document.uri;
    if (!mdUri || !mdUri.fsPath.endsWith('.md')) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请选中一个 Markdown 文件');
      return;
    }

    const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('image-flow');
    const apiKey = await context.secrets.get('image-flow.apiKey');
    if (!apiKey) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先设置 API Key（侧栏设置页）');
      return;
    }

    try {
      const parsed = parseMarkdownFile(mdUri);
      const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
      const model = config.get<string>('model', 'nano-banana-2');
      const baseUrl = config.get<string>('baseUrl', 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn');
      const aspectRatio = config.get<string>('aspectRatio', '3:4');
      const imageSize = config.get<string>('imageSize', '1K');
      const concurrency = config.get<number>('concurrency', 1);

      // 创建任务文件夹
      const now = new Date();
      const ts = `${String(now.getFullYear()).slice(2)}${pad(now.getMonth()+1)}${pad(now.getDate())}${pad(now.getHours())}${pad(now.getMinutes())}${pad(now.getSeconds())}`;
      const taskFolder = findAvailableTaskFolder(mdDir, ts);
      fs.mkdirSync(path.join(mdDir, taskFolder), { recursive: true });

      const task: TaskState = {
        folderName: taskFolder,
        model,
        mdFile: mdUri.fsPath,
        startTime: Date.now(),
        jobs: [],
        downloadIndex: 0
      };

      taskManager.addTask(task);

      // 异步提交（后台）
      taskManager.submitJobs(
        task, baseUrl, apiKey, model,
        parsed.finalPrompt,
        parsed.referenceImages.map(r => r.dataUri),
        aspectRatio, imageSize, concurrency
      ).catch(e => {
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成提交失败：${e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)}`);
      });

    } catch (e) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)}`);
    }
  });

  const previewCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', async (uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
    vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览功能将在 M5 实现');
  });

  context.subscriptions.push(genCmd, previewCmd);

  // 重启续拉
  taskManager.resume();
}

function pad(n: number): string { return String(n).padStart(2, '0'); }

function findAvailableTaskFolder(mdDir: string, ts: string): string {
  let seq = 1;
  while (true) {
    const name = `task-${ts}-${seq}`;
    if (!fs.existsSync(path.join(mdDir, name))) return name;
    seq++;
  }
}

export function deactivate() {}
```

### Task 17: 素材库管理器

**Files:**

- [ ] **Step 1: 创建 src/materialLibrary.ts**

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { IMAGE_EXTENSIONS } from './imageUtils';

export interface MaterialLib {
  name: string;
  path: string;
  isManual: boolean;
  images: string[]; // 绝对路径
}

export class MaterialLibraryManager {
  private static MANUAL_KEY = 'image-flow.manualLibraries';

  constructor(private workspaceState: vscode.Memento) {}

  getManualLibPaths(): string[] {
    return this.workspaceState.get<string[]>(MaterialLibraryManager.MANUAL_KEY) || [];
  }

  async addManualLib(): Promise<void> {
    const folders = await vscode.window.showOpenDialog({
      canSelectFolders: true,
      canSelectMany: false,
      openLabel: '添加素材库'
    });
    if (!folders || folders.length === 0) return;

    const newPath = folders[0].fsPath;
    const existing = this.getManualLibPaths();
    if (existing.includes(newPath)) return; // 去重

    existing.push(newPath);
    await this.workspaceState.update(MaterialLibraryManager.MANUAL_KEY, existing);
  }

  async removeManualLib(libPath: string): Promise<void> {
    const existing = this.getManualLibPaths();
    const idx = existing.indexOf(libPath);
    if (idx >= 0) {
      existing.splice(idx, 1);
      await this.workspaceState.update(MaterialLibraryManager.MANUAL_KEY, existing);
    }
  }

  scanManualLibs(): MaterialLib[] {
    return this.getManualLibPaths().map(libPath => ({
      name: path.basename(libPath),
      path: libPath,
      isManual: true,
      images: this.scanImages(libPath, 3, 500)
    }));
  }

  scanAutoLibs(mdUri: vscode.Uri | undefined, workspaceRoot: string | undefined): MaterialLib[] {
    if (!mdUri || !workspaceRoot) return [];
    const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);

    // 确保 MD 在工作区内
    if (!mdDir.startsWith(workspaceRoot)) return [];

    const libs: MaterialLib[] = [];
    let current = mdDir;

    while (current !== workspaceRoot) {
      const images = fs.readdirSync(current)
        .filter(f => IMAGE_EXTENSIONS.includes(path.extname(f).toLowerCase().slice(1)))
        .map(f => path.join(current, f));

      if (images.length > 0) {
        const relativePath = path.relative(workspaceRoot, current);
        libs.push({
          name: relativePath || path.basename(current),
          path: current,
          isManual: false,
          images
        });
      }

      current = path.dirname(current);
    }

    return libs;
  }

  /** 递归扫描图片，depth 为剩余层数，maxItems 为上限 */
  private scanImages(root: string, depth: number, maxItems: number): string[] {
    if (depth < 0) return [];
    const results: string[] = [];
    try {
      const entries = fs.readdirSync(root, { withFileTypes: true });
      for (const entry of entries) {
        if (results.length >= maxItems) break;
        const fullPath = path.join(root, entry.name);
        if (entry.isFile() && IMAGE_EXTENSIONS.includes(path.extname(entry.name).toLowerCase().slice(1))) {
          results.push(fullPath);
        } else if (entry.isDirectory()) {
          results.push(...this.scanImages(fullPath, depth - 1, maxItems - results.length));
        }
      }
    } catch {}
    return results;
  }
}
```

```typescript
import { MaterialLibraryManager, MaterialLib } from './materialLibrary';
import * as path from 'path';

// 构造函数注入 MaterialLibraryManager
constructor(
  private readonly extensionUri: vscode.Uri,
  private readonly configManager: ConfigManager,
  private readonly materialManager: MaterialLibraryManager
) {}

private async handleInsertImage(imagePath: string, altText: string): Promise<void> {
  const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
  if (!editor || editor.document.uri.fsPath !== this.activeMdPath) {
    vscode.window.showWarningMessage('当前活动编辑器不是生效的 Markdown 文件，忽略插入');
    return;
  }

  const mdDir = path.dirname(editor.document.uri.fsPath);
  let relPath = path.relative(mdDir, imagePath).replace(/\\/g, '/');
  if (relPath.startsWith('..')) {
    // 跨盘符检测
    if (path.parse(imagePath).root !== path.parse(mdDir).root) {
      vscode.window.showWarningMessage('跨盘符无法相对引用');
      return;
    }
  } else {
    relPath = './' + relPath;
  }

  // 空格/括号 → <> 包裹
  if (/[\s()]/.test(relPath)) {
    relPath = `<${relPath}>`;
  }

  const mdRef = `![${altText}](${relPath})`;
  await editor.edit(eb => {
    eb.insert(editor.selection.active, mdRef);
  });
}

private async handleOpenImage(imagePath: string): Promise<void> {
  const uri = vscode.Uri.file(imagePath);
  await vscode.commands.executeCommand('vscode.open', uri);
}
```

private activeMdPath = '';

// 在 pushInit 中更新:
private async pushInit(): Promise<void> {
  const config = this.configManager.getAll();
  const activeEditor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
  const activeMd = activeEditor?.document.uri.fsPath.endsWith('.md')
    ? activeEditor.document.uri.fsPath : '';
  this.activeMdPath = activeMd;

  const materialLibs = this.materialManager.scanManualLibs();
  const autoLibs = this.materialManager.scanAutoLibs(
    activeMd ? vscode.Uri.file(activeMd) : undefined,
    vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri.fsPath
  );

  this.postMessage({
    type: 'init',
    activeMd,
    config,
    tasks: [],
    history: [],
    materialLibs: [...autoLibs, ...materialLibs] // M4
  });
}

### Task 19: 素材库前端组件

```tsx
import React from 'react';
import { vscode } from '../vscode';

interface MaterialLib {
  name: string;
  path: string;
  isManual: boolean;
  images: string[];
}

interface Props {
  libs: MaterialLib[];
  workbenchCols: number;
}

export const MaterialPanel: React.FC<Props> = ({ libs, workbenchCols }) => {
  const handleClick = (imagePath: string) => {
    vscode.postMessage({ type: 'openImage', imagePath });
  };

  const handleContextMenu = (e: React.MouseEvent, imagePath: string) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const fileName = imagePath.replace(/^.*[/\\]/, '').replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '');
    vscode.postMessage({ type: 'insertImage', imagePath, altText: fileName });
  };

  return (
    <div className="material-panel">
      {libs.map(lib => (
        <div key={lib.path} className="material-lib">
          <div className="material-lib-header">
            <span className="material-lib-name">{lib.name}</span>
            {lib.isManual && (
              <button
                className="icon-btn"
                onClick={() => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'removeLib', libPath: lib.path })}
              >
                ✕
              </button>
            )}
          </div>
          <div
            className="material-grid"
            style={{ gridTemplateColumns: `repeat(${workbenchCols}, 1fr)` }}
          >
            {lib.images.map(img => (
              <img
                key={img}
                src={img}
                className="material-thumb"
                onClick={() => handleClick(img)}
                onContextMenu={e => handleContextMenu(e, img)}
                title={img.replace(/^.*[/\\]/, '')}
              />
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      ))}
      <button className="add-lib-btn" onClick={() => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'addLib' })}>
        + 添加
      </button>
    </div>
  );
};
```

## M5: 预览请求

### Task 20: 预览请求体构造 + 预览文档

**Files:**

- [ ] **Step 1: 创建 src/previewProvider.ts**

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import { parseMarkdownFile } from './markdownParser';
import { getAspectRatioValue } from './apiClient';
import { UserConfig } from './shared';

export function buildPreviewContent(
  mdUri: vscode.Uri,
  config: UserConfig
): string {
  const parsed = parseMarkdownFile(mdUri);

  // 1. 最终提示词（M6 加入注入逻辑后共用）
  const promptSection = parsed.finalPrompt;

  // 2. 请求地址
  const apiUrl = `${config.baseUrl}/v1/api/generate`;

  // 3. 请求参数 JSON（剔除 prompt 与 images）
  const sizeFields = getAspectRatioValue(config.model, config.aspectRatio, config.imageSize);
  const body: Record<string, unknown> = {
    model: config.model,
    replyType: 'async'
  };
  if (sizeFields.aspectRatio) body.aspectRatio = sizeFields.aspectRatio;
  if (sizeFields.imageSize) body.imageSize = sizeFields.imageSize;
  const paramsJson = JSON.stringify(body, null, 2);

  // 4. 参考图概览
  let imagesOverview: string;
  if (parsed.referenceImages.length === 0) {
    imagesOverview = '无参考图';
  } else {
    imagesOverview = parsed.referenceImages
      .map(r => {
        const preview = r.dataUri.slice(0, 48);
        return `image${r.index + 1}: ${preview}…（总长度 ${r.dataUri.length}）`;
      })
      .join('\n');
  }

  return [
    '# 预览请求',
    '',
    '## 最终提示词',
    '',
    promptSection,
    '',
    '## 请求地址',
    '',
    `POST ${apiUrl}`,
    '',
    '## 请求参数（已剔除 prompt 与 images）',
    '',
    '```json',
    paramsJson,
    '```',
    '',
    '## 参考图概览',
    '',
    imagesOverview
  ].join('\n');
}

export async function showPreview(mdUri: vscode.Uri, config: UserConfig): Promise<void> {
  const content = buildPreviewContent(mdUri, config);
  const doc = await vscode.workspace.openTextDocument({
    content,
    language: 'markdown'
  });
  await vscode.window.showTextDocument(doc);
}
```

```typescript
// 在 ConfigManager 类中添加：
async seedModelInjections(): Promise<void> {
  const saved = this.globalState.get<Partial<UserConfig>>(ConfigManager.GLOBAL_KEY) || {};
  const injections = saved.modelInjections || {};

  const seeds: Record<string, string> = {
    'gpt-image-2': '整体画面弱化微小细节，避免过度刻画。',
    'gpt-image-2-vip': '整体画面弱化微小细节，避免过度刻画。'
  };

  let changed = false;
  for (const [model, injection] of Object.entries(seeds)) {
    if (!(model in injections)) {
      injections[model] = injection;
      changed = true;
    }
  }

  if (changed) {
    saved.modelInjections = injections;
    await this.globalState.update(ConfigManager.GLOBAL_KEY, saved);
  }
}
```

- [ ] **Step 3: 实现提示词拼装函数**

在 `src/config.ts` 中添加：

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';

export function assemblePrompt(
  basePrompt: string,
  config: UserConfig
): string {
  const parts: string[] = [];

  // 1. 模型注入句
  const injection = config.modelInjections[config.model];
  if (injection && injection.trim()) {
    parts.push(injection.trim());
  }

  // 2. IMAGES.md
  const workspaceRoot = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri.fsPath;
  if (workspaceRoot) {
    const imagesPath = path.join(workspaceRoot, 'IMAGES.md');
    try {
      const content = fs.readFileSync(imagesPath, 'utf-8').trim();
      if (content) {
        parts.push(content);
      }
    } catch {}
  }

  // 3. 替换后正文
  parts.push(basePrompt);

  return parts.join('\n\n');
}
```

### Task 24: 后台提交 + 进度条 + 秒计时

- [ ] **Step 1: 创建 webview-src/components/TaskCard.tsx**

```tsx
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { TaskState } from '../shared';
import { vscode } from '../vscode';

interface Props {
  task: TaskState;
  tasksCols: number;
}

function formatDuration(startMs: number): string {
  const elapsed = Math.floor((Date.now() - startMs) / 1000);
  const h = Math.floor(elapsed / 3600);
  const m = Math.floor((elapsed % 3600) / 60);
  const s = elapsed % 60;
  if (h > 0) return `${h}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(s).padStart(2, '0')}`;
  return `${String(m).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(s).padStart(2, '0')}`;
}

export const TaskCard: React.FC<Props> = ({ task, tasksCols }) => {
  const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState(true);
  const [elapsed, setElapsed] = useState(formatDuration(task.startTime));

  useEffect(() => {
    const timer = setInterval(() => {
      setElapsed(formatDuration(task.startTime));
    }, 1000);
    return () => clearInterval(timer);
  }, [task.startTime]);

  const doneCount = task.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'succeeded').length;
  const failedCount = task.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'failed').length;
  const submittingCount = task.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'submitting').length;
  const total = task.jobs.length;

  // 聚合进度
  let progress = 0;
  if (total > 0) {
    const sum = task.jobs.reduce((acc, j) => {
      if (j.status === 'succeeded' || j.status === 'failed') return acc + 100;
      if (j.status === 'running') return acc + j.progress;
      return acc; // submitting = 0
    }, 0);
    progress = Math.floor(sum / total);
  }

  const allDone = task.jobs.length > 0 && task.jobs.every(j => j.status === 'succeeded' || j.status === 'failed');

  const title = `${task.folderName}（${task.model}） · ${
    allDone ? `完成 ${doneCount}/${total}` : `生成中 ${doneCount}/${total}`
  }${failedCount > 0 ? ` · 失败 ${failedCount}` : ''} · ${elapsed}`;

  // 所有完成且展开 → 收起到历史（by TasksTab 管理）
  // 此处仅渲染当前卡片

  return (
    <div className="task-card">
      <div className="task-card-header" onClick={() => setExpanded(!expanded)}>
        <span className="task-card-title">{title}</span>
        <span className="task-card-toggle">{expanded ? '▾' : '▸'}</span>
      </div>
      {expanded && (
        <div className="task-card-body">
          <div className="progress-bar">
            <div className="progress-fill" style={{ width: `${progress}%` }} />
          </div>
          <span className="progress-text">{progress}%</span>

          {submittingCount > 0 && (
            <p className="task-hint">正在提交 {submittingCount} 个请求…</p>
          )}
          {total - doneCount - failedCount - submittingCount > 0 && (
            <p className="task-hint">还有 {total - doneCount - failedCount - submittingCount} 张正在生成…</p>
          )}

          {task.jobs.filter(j => j.error).map((j, i) => (
            <p key={i} className="task-error">{j.error}</p>
          ))}

          <div
            className="task-images-grid"
            style={{ gridTemplateColumns: `repeat(${tasksCols}, 1fr)` }}
          >
            {task.jobs.flatMap(j => j.results).map(img => (
              <img
                key={img}
                src={img}
                className="task-thumb"
                onClick={() => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'openImage', imagePath: img })}
              />
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};
```

- [ ] **Step 2: 更新 TasksTab 使用 TaskCard**

```tsx
// TasksTab.tsx 完整版:
import React from 'react';
import { TaskState, HistoryEntry } from '../shared';
import { TaskCard } from './TaskCard';
import { vscode } from '../vscode';

interface Props {
  tasks: TaskState[];
  history: HistoryEntry[];
  tasksCols: number;
}

export const TasksTab: React.FC<Props> = ({ tasks, history, tasksCols }) => {
  if (tasks.length === 0 && history.length === 0) {
    return <p className="placeholder-text">暂无任务</p>;
  }

  // 进行中任务在前（倒序），历史在后（倒序）
  const allItems: ('separator' | TaskState | HistoryEntry)[] = [...tasks];
  if (tasks.length > 0 && history.length > 0) {
    // 不显示分隔符，直接用不同样式区分
  }
  if (history.length > 0) {
    allItems.push('separator');
    allItems.push(...history);
  }

  return (
    <div className="tasks-tab">
      {tasks.map(task => (
        <TaskCard key={task.folderName} task={task} tasksCols={tasksCols} />
      ))}
      {history.length > 0 && (
        <div className="history-section">
          <h3 className="history-title">历史记录</h3>
          {history.map(entry => (
            <HistoryCard key={entry.folderName} entry={entry} tasksCols={tasksCols} />
          ))}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

const HistoryCard: React.FC<{ entry: HistoryEntry; tasksCols: number }> = ({ entry, tasksCols }) => {
  const [expanded, setExpanded] = React.useState(false);
  return (
    <div className="task-card history-card">
      <div className="task-card-header" onClick={() => setExpanded(!expanded)}>
        <span className="task-card-title">{entry.folderName}（{entry.imageCount} 张）</span>
        <span className="task-card-toggle">{expanded ? '▾' : '▸'}</span>
      </div>
      {expanded && (
        <div
          className="task-images-grid"
          style={{ gridTemplateColumns: `repeat(${tasksCols}, 1fr)` }}
        >
          {entry.images.map(img => (
            <img
              key={img}
              src={img}
              className="task-thumb"
              onClick={() => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'openImage', imagePath: img })}
            />
          ))}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};
```

### Task 25: 历史扫描与任务/历史合并列表

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/sidebarProvider.ts`

- [ ] **Step 1: 在 sidebarProvider 中实现 pushHistory**

```typescript
import * as fs from 'fs';
import * as path from 'path';
import { IMAGE_EXTENSIONS } from './imageUtils';

private pushHistory(mdPath: string): void {
  if (!mdPath) return;
  const mdDir = path.dirname(mdPath);
  const taskDirs: string[] = [];

  try {
    const entries = fs.readdirSync(mdDir, { withFileTypes: true });
    for (const entry of entries) {
      if (entry.isDirectory() && entry.name.startsWith('task-')) {
        // 排除进行中任务的文件夹
        const isActive = this._tasks.some(t => t.folderName === entry.name);
        if (!isActive) {
          const images = fs.readdirSync(path.join(mdDir, entry.name))
            .filter(f => IMAGE_EXTENSIONS.includes(path.extname(f).toLowerCase().slice(1)))
            .map(f => path.join(mdDir, entry.name, f));
          if (images.length > 0) {
            taskDirs.push(entry.name);
            // 发送到前端
          }
        }
      }
    }
  } catch {}
}
```

完整实现需要将历史条目通过消息推送到 webview。在 `sidebarProvider.ts` 中添加 `_tasks` 字段跟踪进行中任务。

### Task 27: 响应运行时校验

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/apiClient.ts`

- [ ] **Step 1: 添加响应校验函数**

在 `apiClient.ts` 中添加：

```typescript
import { ApiGenerateResponse, ApiResultResponse } from './shared';

export function validateGenerateResponse(data: unknown): ApiGenerateResponse {
  if (!data || typeof data !== 'object') {
    throw new Error('响应格式异常：非对象');
  }
  const d = data as Record<string, unknown>;

  const validStatuses = ['running', 'succeeded', 'failed', 'violation'];
  if (d.status && !validStatuses.includes(d.status as string)) {
    throw new Error(`响应格式异常：未知状态 ${d.status}`);
  }

  if (d.results !== undefined && !Array.isArray(d.results)) {
    throw new Error('响应格式异常：results 非数组');
  }

  return data as ApiGenerateResponse;
}

export function validateResultResponse(data: unknown): ApiResultResponse {
  return validateGenerateResponse(data) as ApiResultResponse;
}

export function isTransientError(error: unknown): boolean {
  const msg = String(error);
  // HTTP 5xx / 429 / abort / fetch failed
  if (msg.includes('HTTP 5') || msg.includes('HTTP 429')) return true;
  if (msg.includes('abort') || msg.includes('fetch failed')) return true;
  if (msg.includes('AbortError') || msg.includes('Timeout')) return true;
  return false;
}
```

- [ ] **Step 2: 在 submitGenerate 和 pollResult 中使用校验**

```typescript

// pollResult 中：
const data = validateResultResponse(await resp.json());
```

```typescript
import * as path from 'path';
import Mocha from 'mocha';
import { glob } from 'glob';

export async function run(): Promise<void> {
  const mocha = new Mocha({ ui: 'tdd', color: true });
  const testsRoot = path.resolve(__dirname);

  const files = await glob('**/*.test.js', { cwd: testsRoot });
  files.forEach(f => mocha.addFile(path.resolve(testsRoot, f)));

  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    mocha.run(failures => {
      if (failures > 0) reject(new Error(`${failures} tests failed`));
      else resolve();
    });
  });
}
```

```typescript
import * as assert from 'assert';
import { parseMarkdownImages, resolveAndValidateImages, replaceImageRefs } from '../../src/markdownParser';

suite('Markdown 解析', () => {

  test('解析普通图片语法', () => {
    const text = 'Hello ![cat](cat.png) world';
    const refs = parseMarkdownImages(text);
    assert.strictEqual(refs.length, 1);
    assert.strictEqual(refs[0].alt, 'cat');
    assert.strictEqual(refs[0].path, 'cat.png');
  });

  test('解析尖括号路径（空格）', () => {
    const text = 'See ![my cat](<my cat.png>) here';
    const refs = parseMarkdownImages(text);
    assert.strictEqual(refs.length, 1);
    assert.strictEqual(refs[0].path, 'my cat.png');
  });

  test('解析尖括号路径（括号）', () => {
    const text = 'See ![img](<image (1).png>) here';
    const refs = parseMarkdownImages(text);
    assert.strictEqual(refs[0].path, 'image (1).png');
  });

  test('多张图片按首次出现顺序去重编号', () => {
    const text = 'a ![a](a.png) b ![b](b.png) c ![a](a.png) d ![c](c.png)';
    const refs = parseMarkdownImages(text);
    assert.strictEqual(refs.length, 4);
    // a.png, b.png, a.png(dup), c.png
    // dedupMap 中 a.png→0, b.png→1, c.png→2
    const dedupMap = new Map<string, number>();
    const seen = new Set<string>();
    let idx = 0;
    for (const r of refs) {
      if (!dedupMap.has(r.path)) {
        seen.add(r.path);
        dedupMap.set(r.path, idx++);
      }
    }
    assert.strictEqual(dedupMap.get('a.png'), 0);
    assert.strictEqual(dedupMap.get('b.png'), 1);
    assert.strictEqual(dedupMap.get('c.png'), 2);
  });

  test('替换编号与参考图数组顺序一致', () => {
    const text = 'input ![first](b.png) mid ![second](a.png) end ![third](b.png)';
    const refs = parseMarkdownImages(text);
    const dedupMap = new Map<string, number>();
    dedupMap.set('b.png', 0);
    dedupMap.set('a.png', 1);
    const replaced = replaceImageRefs(text, dedupMap);
    assert.ok(replaced.includes('[image1](b)'));
    assert.ok(replaced.includes('[image2](a)'));
    assert.ok(replaced.includes('[image1](b)')); // 第二次 b.png 仍用 1
  });

  test('内容为空报错', () => {
    // parseMarkdownFile 需要真实文件——此处测试纯逻辑
    const refs = parseMarkdownImages('   ');
    assert.strictEqual(refs.length, 0);
  });

});
```

- [ ] **Step 4: 创建 test/suite/progress.test.ts**

```typescript
import * as assert from 'assert';

suite('聚合进度计算', () => {

  function calcProgress(
    jobs: { status: string; progress: number }[]
  ): number {
    if (jobs.length === 0) return 0;
    const sum = jobs.reduce((acc, j) => {
      if (j.status === 'succeeded' || j.status === 'failed') return acc + 100;
      if (j.status === 'running') return acc + j.progress;
      return acc; // submitting = 0
    }, 0);
    return Math.floor(sum / jobs.length);
  }

  test('全 submitting = 0', () => {
    const jobs = [
      { status: 'submitting', progress: 0 },
      { status: 'submitting', progress: 0 }
    ];
    assert.strictEqual(calcProgress(jobs), 0);
  });

  test('混合态：1 running 50%, 1 submitting, 1 succeeded', () => {
    const jobs = [
      { status: 'running', progress: 50 },
      { status: 'submitting', progress: 0 },
      { status: 'succeeded', progress: 0 }
    ];
    assert.strictEqual(calcProgress(jobs), Math.floor(150 / 3)); // 50
  });

  test('全部终结 = 100', () => {
    const jobs = [
      { status: 'succeeded', progress: 0 },
      { status: 'failed', progress: 0 }
    ];
    assert.strictEqual(calcProgress(jobs), 100);
  });

  test('全 running 全 0 = 0', () => {
    const jobs = [
      { status: 'running', progress: 0 },
      { status: 'running', progress: 0 }
    ];
    assert.strictEqual(calcProgress(jobs), 0);
  });

});
```

- [ ] **Step 5: 创建 test/suite/errorClassification.test.ts**

```typescript
import * as assert from 'assert';

suite('瞬时错误判定', () => {

  function isTransientError(msg: string): boolean {
    if (msg.includes('HTTP 5') || msg.includes('HTTP 429')) return true;
    if (msg.includes('abort') || msg.includes('fetch failed')) return true;
    if (msg.includes('AbortError') || msg.includes('Timeout')) return true;
    return false;
  }

  test('HTTP 500 是瞬时', () => assert.ok(isTransientError('API 返回 HTTP 500')));
  test('HTTP 503 是瞬时', () => assert.ok(isTransientError('API 返回 HTTP 503')));
  test('HTTP 429 是瞬时', () => assert.ok(isTransientError('查询 API 返回 HTTP 429')));
  test('abort 是瞬时', () => assert.ok(isTransientError('The operation was aborted')));
  test('fetch failed 是瞬时', () => assert.ok(isTransientError('fetch failed')));
  test('HTTP 400 非瞬时', () => assert.ok(!isTransientError('API 返回 HTTP 400')));
  test('格式异常非瞬时', () => assert.ok(!isTransientError('响应格式异常：未知状态 xxx')));
  test('超时 abort 是瞬时', () => assert.ok(isTransientError('AbortError: The operation was aborted')));

});
```

import { getAspectRatioValue, VIP_PIXELS } from '../../src/apiClient';

suite('gpt-image-2-vip 像素换算', () => {

  test('3:4 + 1K → 864x1152', () => {

    assert.strictEqual(result.aspectRatio, '864x1152');
    assert.strictEqual(result.imageSize, undefined);
  });

  test('3:4 + 2K → 1728x2304', () => {
    const result = getAspectRatioValue('gpt-image-2-vip', '3:4', '2K');
    assert.strictEqual(result.aspectRatio, '1728x2304');
  });

  test('1:1 + 4K → 2880x2880', () => {
    const result = getAspectRatioValue('gpt-image-2-vip', '1:1', '4K');
    assert.strictEqual(result.aspectRatio, '2880x2880');
  });

  test('16:9 + 1K → 1792x1024', () => {
    const result = getAspectRatioValue('gpt-image-2-vip', '16:9', '1K');
    assert.strictEqual(result.aspectRatio, '1792x1024');
  });

  test('nano-banana 系列传 aspectRatio + imageSize', () => {
    const result = getAspectRatioValue('nano-banana-2', '3:4', '2K');
    assert.strictEqual(result.aspectRatio, '3:4');
    assert.strictEqual(result.imageSize, '2K');
  });

  test('gpt-image-2 只传 aspectRatio', () => {
    const result = getAspectRatioValue('gpt-image-2', '3:4', '2K');
    assert.strictEqual(result.aspectRatio, '3:4');
    assert.strictEqual(result.imageSize, undefined);
  });

  test('未知比例回退到 864x1152', () => {
    const result = getAspectRatioValue('gpt-image-2-vip', '21:9', '1K');
    assert.strictEqual(result.aspectRatio, '864x1152');
  });

});

import * as assert from 'assert';

suite('预览文本组装', () => {

  function buildPreviewContentSimple(
    finalPrompt: string,
    baseUrl: string,
    bodyNoPrompt: Record<string, unknown>,
    imagesCount: number,
    imagesOverview: string
  ): string {
    const lines = [
      '# 预览请求', '',
      '## 最终提示词', '', finalPrompt, '',
      '## 请求地址', '', `POST ${baseUrl}/v1/api/generate`, '',
      '## 请求参数（已剔除 prompt 与 images）', '',
      '```json',
      JSON.stringify(bodyNoPrompt, null, 2),
      '```', '',
      '## 参考图概览', '',
      imagesCount === 0 ? '无参考图' : imagesOverview
    ];
    return lines.join('\n');
  }

  test('包含所有四段', () => {
    const content = buildPreviewContentSimple(
      'test prompt', 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn',
      { model: 'nano-banana-2', replyType: 'async', aspectRatio: '3:4', imageSize: '1K' },
      2, 'image1: abc…（总长度 123）\nimage2: def…（总长度 456）'
    );
    assert.ok(content.includes('## 最终提示词'));
    assert.ok(content.includes('## 请求地址'));
    assert.ok(content.includes('POST https://grsai.dakka.com.cn/v1/api/generate'));
    assert.ok(content.includes('## 请求参数（已剔除 prompt 与 images）'));
    assert.ok(content.includes('## 参考图概览'));
  });

  test('无 prompt 字段', () => {
    const body = { model: 'gpt-image-2', aspectRatio: '16:9', replyType: 'async' };
    const json = JSON.stringify(body, null, 2);
    assert.ok(!json.includes('prompt'));
  });

  test('无 images 字段', () => {
    const body = { model: 'nano-banana-2', aspectRatio: '1:1', imageSize: '1K', replyType: 'async' };
    const json = JSON.stringify(body, null, 2);
    assert.ok(!json.includes('images'));
  });

  test('无参考图时注明', () => {
    const content = buildPreviewContentSimple(
      'test', 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn',
      { model: 'nano-banana-2' }, 0, ''
    );
    assert.ok(content.includes('无参考图'));
  });

  test('参考图概览格式', () => {
    const content = buildPreviewContentSimple(
      'test', 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn',
      { model: 'nano-banana-2' }, 1,

    );
    assert.ok(content.includes('image1:'));
    assert.ok(content.includes('data:image/png;base64,iVBORw'));
    assert.ok(content.includes('总长度 50000'));
  });

});

> ### 关键设计决策
> - **分阶段渐进式**：M1 先用同步模式跑通端到端，M3 再切异步，降低单次改动复杂度
> - **前后端类型共享**：`src/shared.ts` 和 `webview-src/shared.ts` 保持同步，消息协议集中管理
> - **纯函数优先**：Markdown 解析、像素换算、进度计算、错误判定均拆为纯函数，便于测试
>

import * as esbuild from 'esbuild';

const production = process.argv.includes('--production');
const watch = process.argv.includes('--watch');

/** @type {esbuild.BuildOptions} */
const extensionConfig = {
  entryPoints: ['src/extension.ts'],
  bundle: true,
  external: ['vscode'],
  format: 'cjs',
  platform: 'node',
  target: 'ES2022',
  outfile: 'dist/extension.js',
  sourcemap: !production,
  minify: production
};

/** @type {esbuild.BuildOptions} */
const sidebarConfig = {
  entryPoints: ['webview-src/index.tsx'],
  bundle: true,
  format: 'iife',
  platform: 'browser',
  target: 'ES2022',
  outfile: 'media/sidebar.js',
  sourcemap: !production,
  minify: production
};

async function main() {
  if (watch) {
    const extCtx = await esbuild.context(extensionConfig);
    const sideCtx = await esbuild.context(sidebarConfig);
    await extCtx.watch();
    await sideCtx.watch();
    console.log('[esbuild] watching...');
  } else {
    await esbuild.build(extensionConfig);
    await esbuild.build(sidebarConfig);
    console.log('[esbuild] build complete');
  }
}

main().catch((e) => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); });

```
