```typescript
// ========== 消息类型（extension ↔ webview） ==========

export type ExtMessage =
  | { type: 'init'; activeMd: string; config: UserConfig; tasks: TaskState[]; history: HistoryEntry[]; materialLibs: MaterialLib[] }
  | { type: 'configUpdate'; config: UserConfig }
  | { type: 'taskUpdate'; tasks: TaskState[]; history: HistoryEntry[] }
  | { type: 'statusMessage'; text: string; isError: boolean }
  | { type: 'activeMdUpdate'; activeMd: string; materialLibs: MaterialLib[]; history?: HistoryEntry[] };

export type WebviewMessage =
  | { type: 'init' }
  | { type: 'setApiKey'; value: string }
  | { type: 'setConfig'; key: string; value: unknown }
  | { type: 'generate' }
  | { type: 'preview' }
  | { type: 'insertImage'; imagePath: string; altText: string }
  | { type: 'openImage'; imagePath: string }
  | { type: 'addLib' }
  | { type: 'removeLib'; libPath: string };

// ========== 用户配置 ==========

export interface UserConfig {
  apiKey: string;           // 仅用于判断是否已设置，不传递明文
  baseUrl: string;
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number;
  workbenchCols: number;
  tasksCols: number;
  modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
}

// ========== 任务状态 ==========

export type JobStatus = 'submitting' | 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed';

export interface JobState {
  id: string;               // job id（submitting 时可空）
  status: JobStatus;
  progress: number;         // 0~100
  error: string;
  results: string[];        // 已下载本地图片路径
}

export interface TaskState {
  folderName: string;       // task-<timestamp>-<seq>
  model: string;
  mdFile: string;
  startTime: number;        // 真实开始时间戳 ms
  jobs: JobState[];
  downloadIndex: number;    // 下一个下载图片序号（任务内接续编号）
}

export interface HistoryEntry {
  folderName: string;
  imageCount: number;
  images: string[];         // 缩略图路径列表
}

export interface MaterialLib {
  name: string;
  path: string;
  isManual: boolean;
  images: string[];
}

// ========== 解析结果 ==========

export interface ParseResult {
  finalPrompt: string;
  referenceImages: { index: number; dataUri: string; originalPath: string }[];
}

// ========== API 响应类型（运行时校验用） ==========

export interface ApiGenerateResponse {
  id?: string;
  status?: string;
  results?: { url?: string }[];
  progress?: number;
  error?: string;
}

export type ApiResultResponse = ApiGenerateResponse;

```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { ParseResult } from './shared';

// 匹配 ![alt](path) 或 ![alt](<path with spaces>)
const IMAGE_RE = /!\[([^\]]*)\]\(<?([^)>]*?)>?\)/g;

interface ImageRef {
  fullMatch: string;
  alt: string;
  path: string;
}

function parseMarkdownImages(text: string): ImageRef[] {
  const refs: ImageRef[] = [];
  let m: RegExpExecArray | null;
  IMAGE_RE.lastIndex = 0;
  while ((m = IMAGE_RE.exec(text)) !== null) {
    refs.push({ fullMatch: m[0], alt: m[1], path: m[2] });
  }
  return refs;
}

function resolveAndValidateImages(
  refs: ImageRef[],
  mdDir: string
): { dataUris: string[]; dedupMap: Map<string, number>; errors: string[] } {
  const dedupMap = new Map<string, number>(); // path -> index
  const dataUris: string[] = [];
  const errors: string[] = [];
  let nextIndex = 0;

  for (const ref of refs) {
    if (dedupMap.has(ref.path)) {
      continue; // 去重
    }
    const absPath = path.resolve(mdDir, ref.path);
    try {
      const buffer = fs.readFileSync(absPath);
      const ext = path.extname(absPath).toLowerCase().slice(1);
      const mime = getMimeType(ext);
      const dataUri = `data:${mime};base64,${buffer.toString('base64')}`;
      dedupMap.set(ref.path, nextIndex);
      dataUris.push(dataUri);
      nextIndex++;
    } catch {
      errors.push(ref.path);
    }
  }

  return { dataUris, dedupMap, errors };
}

function replaceImageRefs(text: string, dedupMap: Map<string, number>): string {
  let result = text;
  IMAGE_RE.lastIndex = 0;
  result = result.replace(IMAGE_RE, (_full, _alt, p) => {
    const index = dedupMap.get(p);
    if (index === undefined) return _full;
    const fileName = p.replace(/^.*[/\\]/, '').replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '');
    return `[image${index + 1}](${fileName})`;
  });
  return result;
}

function getMimeType(ext: string): string {
  const mimeMap: Record<string, string> = {
    png: 'image/png',
    jpg: 'image/jpeg',
    jpeg: 'image/jpeg',
    gif: 'image/gif',
    webp: 'image/webp',
    bmp: 'image/bmp',
    svg: 'image/svg+xml'
  };
  return mimeMap[ext] || 'image/png';
}

export function parseMarkdownFile(mdUri: vscode.Uri): ParseResult {
  const content = fs.readFileSync(mdUri.fsPath, 'utf-8');
  const trimmed = content.trim();
  if (!trimmed) {
    throw new Error('内容为空');
  }

  const refs = parseMarkdownImages(content);
  const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
  const { dataUris, dedupMap, errors } = resolveAndValidateImages(refs, mdDir);

  if (errors.length > 0) {
    throw new Error(`参考图读取失败：\n${errors.join('\n')}`);
  }

  const replaced = replaceImageRefs(content, dedupMap);

  return {
    finalPrompt: replaced,
    referenceImages: dataUris.map((dataUri, i) => ({
      index: i,
      dataUri,
      originalPath: refs.filter((r, idx) => refs.findIndex(r2 => r2.path === r.path) === idx)[i]?.path || ''
    }))
  };
}

```
</details>

```typescript
import { ApiGenerateResponse, ApiResultResponse } from './shared';

const TIMEOUT_MS = 30_000;

function controller(): AbortController {
  const c = new AbortController();
  setTimeout(() => c.abort(), TIMEOUT_MS);
  return c;
}

// gpt-image-2-vip 像素换算表
export const VIP_PIXELS: Record<string, Record<string, string>> = {
  '1:1': { '1K': '1024x1024', '2K': '2048x2048', '4K': '2880x2880' },
  '16:9': { '1K': '1792x1024', '2K': '2688x1536', '4K': '3840x2160' },
  '9:16': { '1K': '1024x1792', '2K': '1536x2688', '4K': '2160x3840' },
  '4:3': { '1K': '1536x1152', '2K': '2304x1728', '4K': '3456x2592' },
  '3:4': { '1K': '864x1152', '2K': '1728x2304', '4K': '2592x3456' }
};

export function getAspectRatioValue(
  model: string, aspectRatio: string, imageSize: string
): { aspectRatio?: string; imageSize?: string } {
  if (model.startsWith('nano-banana')) {
    return { aspectRatio, imageSize };
  }
  if (model === 'gpt-image-2') {
    return { aspectRatio };
  }
  if (model === 'gpt-image-2-vip') {
    const pixels = VIP_PIXELS[aspectRatio]?.[imageSize] || '864x1152';
    return { aspectRatio: pixels };
  }
  return { aspectRatio, imageSize };
}

export interface GenerateRequest {
  baseUrl: string;
  apiKey: string;
  model: string;
  prompt: string;
  images: string[];
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  replyType: 'json' | 'async';
}

export async function submitGenerate(req: GenerateRequest): Promise<string> {
  const body: Record<string, unknown> = {
    model: req.model,
    prompt: req.prompt,
    images: req.images,
    replyType: req.replyType
  };

  const sizeFields = getAspectRatioValue(req.model, req.aspectRatio, req.imageSize);
  if (sizeFields.aspectRatio) body.aspectRatio = sizeFields.aspectRatio;
  if (sizeFields.imageSize) body.imageSize = sizeFields.imageSize;

  const resp = await fetch(`${req.baseUrl}/v1/api/generate`, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: {
      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      'Authorization': `Bearer ${req.apiKey}`
    },
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
    signal: controller().signal
  });

  if (!resp.ok) {
    throw new Error(`API 返回 HTTP ${resp.status}`);
  }

  const data: ApiGenerateResponse = await resp.json();
  if (!data.id || data.status === 'failed' || data.status === 'violation') {
    throw new Error(data.error || `生成提交失败：${data.status || '无 id'}`);
  }

  return data.id;
}

export async function pollResult(baseUrl: string, apiKey: string, jobId: string): Promise<ApiResultResponse> {
  const url = `${baseUrl}/v1/api/result?id=${encodeURIComponent(jobId)}`;
  const resp = await fetch(url, {
    headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiKey}` },
    signal: controller().signal
  });

  if (!resp.ok) {
    throw new Error(`查询 API 返回 HTTP ${resp.status}`);
  }

  const data: ApiResultResponse = await resp.json();
  return data;
}

export async function downloadImage(url: string, destPath: string): Promise<void> {
  const resp = await fetch(url, { signal: controller().signal });
  if (!resp.ok) {
    throw new Error(`下载图片 HTTP ${resp.status}`);
  }
  const buffer = Buffer.from(await resp.arrayBuffer());
  const fs = await import('fs');
  fs.writeFileSync(destPath, buffer);
}

export const POLL_INTERVAL_MS = 4000;
export const TASK_TIMEOUT_MS = 10 * 60 * 1000; // 10 分钟

```
</details>

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { parseMarkdownFile } from './markdownParser';
import { submitGenerate, downloadImage } from './apiClient';

export function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {
  // 生成命令
  const genCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.generateImage', async (uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
    const mdUri = uri || vscode.window.activeTextEditor?.document.uri;
    if (!mdUri || !mdUri.fsPath.endsWith('.md')) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请选中一个 Markdown 文件');
      return;
    }

    const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('image-flow');
    const apiKey = await context.secrets.get('image-flow.apiKey');
    if (!apiKey) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先设置 API Key（侧栏设置页）');
      return;
    }

    try {
      // 解析 Markdown
      const parsed = parseMarkdownFile(mdUri);

      // 组装请求体
      const model = config.get<string>('model', 'nano-banana-2');
      const baseUrl = config.get<string>('baseUrl', 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn');
      const aspectRatio = config.get<string>('aspectRatio', '3:4');
      const imageSize = config.get<string>('imageSize', '1K');
      const concurrency = config.get<number>('concurrency', 1);

      const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
      const mdName = path.basename(mdUri.fsPath, '.md');

      // 创建任务文件夹
      const now = new Date();
      const ts = `${String(now.getFullYear()).slice(2)}${pad(now.getMonth() + 1)}${pad(now.getDate())}${pad(now.getHours())}${pad(now.getMinutes())}${pad(now.getSeconds())}`;
      const taskFolder = findAvailableTaskFolder(mdDir, ts);
      fs.mkdirSync(path.join(mdDir, taskFolder), { recursive: true });

      const images = parsed.referenceImages.map(r => r.dataUri);

      // 并发提交 N 个请求（M1 用同步 json 模式）
      const promises: Promise<string>[] = [];
      for (let i = 0; i < concurrency; i++) {
        promises.push(submitGenerate({
          baseUrl, apiKey, model,
          prompt: parsed.finalPrompt,
          images,
          aspectRatio, imageSize,
          replyType: 'json'
        }));
      }

      const results = await Promise.allSettled(promises);
      const failures: string[] = [];
      let downloadIdx = 0;

      for (const result of results) {
        if (result.status === 'rejected') {
          failures.push(String(result.reason));
          continue;
        }

        // 同步模式：submitGenerate 返回即完成，下载图片（按结果中的 url 下载）
        // 注：同步回复中也带 results 字段
        downloadIdx++;
      }

      if (failures.length === concurrency) {
        // 全部失败：删除空文件夹
        try { fs.rmdirSync(path.join(mdDir, taskFolder)); } catch { /* ignore */ }
        throw new Error([...new Set(failures)].join('\n'));
      }

      vscode.window.showInformationMessage(`生成完成，任务文件夹：${taskFolder}`);
    } catch (e) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)}`);
    }
  });

  // 预览命令（M5 实现，先占位）
  const previewCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', async (_uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
    vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览功能将在 M5 实现');
  });

  context.subscriptions.push(genCmd, previewCmd);
}

export function deactivate() {}

function pad(n: number): string {
  return String(n).padStart(2, '0');
}

function findAvailableTaskFolder(mdDir: string, ts: string): string {
  let seq = 1;
  while (true) {
    const name = `task-${ts}-${seq}`;
    if (!fs.existsSync(path.join(mdDir, name))) return name;
    seq++;
  }
}

```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { parseMarkdownFile } from './markdownParser';
import { submitGenerate } from './apiClient';

export function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {
  // 生成命令
  const genCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.generateImage', async (uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
    const mdUri = uri || vscode.window.activeTextEditor?.document.uri;
    if (!mdUri || !mdUri.fsPath.endsWith('.md')) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请选中一个 Markdown 文件');
      return;
    }

    const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('image-flow');
    const apiKey = await context.secrets.get('image-flow.apiKey');
    if (!apiKey) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先设置 API Key（侧栏设置页）');
      return;
    }

    try {
      // 解析 Markdown
      const parsed = parseMarkdownFile(mdUri);

      // 组装请求体
      const model = config.get<string>('model', 'nano-banana-2');
      const baseUrl = config.get<string>('baseUrl', 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn');
      const aspectRatio = config.get<string>('aspectRatio', '3:4');
      const imageSize = config.get<string>('imageSize', '1K');
      const concurrency = config.get<number>('concurrency', 1);

      const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
      const mdName = path.basename(mdUri.fsPath, '.md');

      // 创建任务文件夹
      const now = new Date();
      const ts = `${String(now.getFullYear()).slice(2)}${pad(now.getMonth() + 1)}${pad(now.getDate())}${pad(now.getHours())}${pad(now.getMinutes())}${pad(now.getSeconds())}`;
      const taskFolder = findAvailableTaskFolder(mdDir, ts);
      fs.mkdirSync(path.join(mdDir, taskFolder), { recursive: true });

      const images = parsed.referenceImages.map(r => r.dataUri);

      // 并发提交 N 个请求（M1 用同步 json 模式）
      const promises: Promise<string>[] = [];
      for (let i = 0; i < concurrency; i++) {
        promises.push(submitGenerate({
          baseUrl, apiKey, model,
          prompt: parsed.finalPrompt,
          images,
          aspectRatio, imageSize,
          replyType: 'json'
        }));
      }

      const results = await Promise.allSettled(promises);
      const failures: string[] = [];
      let downloadIdx = 0;

      for (const result of results) {
        if (result.status === 'rejected') {
          failures.push(String(result.reason));
          continue;
        }

        // 同步模式：submitGenerate 返回即完成，下载图片（按结果中的 url 下载）
        // 注：同步回复中也带 results 字段
        downloadIdx++;
      }

      if (failures.length === concurrency) {
        // 全部失败：删除空文件夹
        try { fs.rmdirSync(path.join(mdDir, taskFolder)); } catch { /* ignore */ }
        throw new Error([...new Set(failures)].join('\n'));
      }

      vscode.window.showInformationMessage(`生成完成，任务文件夹：${taskFolder}`);
    } catch (e) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)}`);
    }
  });

  // 预览命令（M5 实现，先占位）
  const previewCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', async (_uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
    vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览功能将在 M5 实现');
  });

  context.subscriptions.push(genCmd, previewCmd);
}

export function deactivate() {}

function pad(n: number): string {
  return String(n).padStart(2, '0');
}

function findAvailableTaskFolder(mdDir: string, ts: string): string {
  let seq = 1;
  while (true) {
    const name = `task-${ts}-${seq}`;
    if (!fs.existsSync(path.join(mdDir, name))) return name;
    seq++;
  }
}

```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { parseMarkdownFile } from './markdownParser';
import { submitGenerate } from './apiClient';

export function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {
  // 生成命令
  const genCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.generateImage', async (uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
    const mdUri = uri || vscode.window.activeTextEditor?.document.uri;
    if (!mdUri || !mdUri.fsPath.endsWith('.md')) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请选中一个 Markdown 文件');
      return;
    }

    const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('image-flow');
    const apiKey = await context.secrets.get('image-flow.apiKey');
    if (!apiKey) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先设置 API Key（侧栏设置页）');
      return;
    }

    try {
      // 解析 Markdown
      const parsed = parseMarkdownFile(mdUri);

      // 组装请求体
      const model = config.get<string>('model', 'nano-banana-2');
      const baseUrl = config.get<string>('baseUrl', 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn');
      const aspectRatio = config.get<string>('aspectRatio', '3:4');
      const imageSize = config.get<string>('imageSize', '1K');
      const concurrency = config.get<number>('concurrency', 1);

      const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);

      // 创建任务文件夹
      const now = new Date();
      const ts = `${String(now.getFullYear()).slice(2)}${pad(now.getMonth() + 1)}${pad(now.getDate())}${pad(now.getHours())}${pad(now.getMinutes())}${pad(now.getSeconds())}`;
      const taskFolder = findAvailableTaskFolder(mdDir, ts);
      fs.mkdirSync(path.join(mdDir, taskFolder), { recursive: true });

      const images = parsed.referenceImages.map(r => r.dataUri);

      // 并发提交 N 个请求（M1 用同步 json 模式）
      const promises: Promise<string>[] = [];
      for (let i = 0; i < concurrency; i++) {
        promises.push(submitGenerate({
          baseUrl, apiKey, model,
          prompt: parsed.finalPrompt,
          images,
          aspectRatio, imageSize,
          replyType: 'json'
        }));
      }

      const results = await Promise.allSettled(promises);
      const failures: string[] = [];

      for (const result of results) {
        if (result.status === 'rejected') {
          failures.push(String(result.reason));
          continue;
        }
      }

      if (failures.length === concurrency) {
        // 全部失败：删除空文件夹
        try { fs.rmdirSync(path.join(mdDir, taskFolder)); } catch { /* ignore */ }
        throw new Error([...new Set(failures)].join('\n'));
      }

      vscode.window.showInformationMessage(`生成完成，任务文件夹：${taskFolder}`);
    } catch (e) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)}`);
    }
  });

  // 预览命令（M5 实现，先占位）
  const previewCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', async () => {
    vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览功能将在 M5 实现');
  });

  context.subscriptions.push(genCmd, previewCmd);
}

export function deactivate() {}

function pad(n: number): string {
  return String(n).padStart(2, '0');
}

function findAvailableTaskFolder(mdDir: string, ts: string): string {
  let seq = 1;
  while (true) {
    const name = `task-${ts}-${seq}`;
    if (!fs.existsSync(path.join(mdDir, name))) return name;
    seq++;
  }
}

```

````markdown
### Task 4: Markdown 解析器

**Files:**
- Create: `src/markdownParser.ts`

- [ ] **Step 1: 创建 src/markdownParser.ts**

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { ParseResult } from './shared';

// 匹配 ![alt](path) 或 ![alt](<path with spaces>)
const IMAGE_RE = /!\[([^\]]*)\]\(<?([^)>]*?)>?\)/g;

interface ImageRef {
  fullMatch: string;
  alt: string;
  path: string;
}

export function parseMarkdownImages(text: string): ImageRef[] {
  const refs: ImageRef[] = [];
  let m: RegExpExecArray | null;
  IMAGE_RE.lastIndex = 0;
  while ((m = IMAGE_RE.exec(text)) !== null) {
    refs.push({ fullMatch: m[0], alt: m[1], path: m[2] });
  }
  return refs;
}

export function resolveAndValidateImages(
  refs: ImageRef[],
  mdDir: string
): { dataUris: string[]; dedupMap: Map<string, number>; errors: string[] } {
  const dedupMap = new Map<string, number>(); // path -> index
  const dataUris: string[] = [];
  const errors: string[] = [];
  let nextIndex = 0;

  for (const ref of refs) {
    if (dedupMap.has(ref.path)) {
      continue; // 去重
    }
    const absPath = path.resolve(mdDir, ref.path);
    try {
      const buffer = fs.readFileSync(absPath);
      const ext = path.extname(absPath).toLowerCase().slice(1);
      const mime = getMimeType(ext);
      const dataUri = `data:${mime};base64,${buffer.toString('base64')}`;
      dedupMap.set(ref.path, nextIndex);
      dataUris.push(dataUri);
      nextIndex++;
    } catch {
      errors.push(ref.path);
    }
  }

  return { dataUris, dedupMap, errors };
}

export function replaceImageRefs(text: string, dedupMap: Map<string, number>): string {
  let result = text;
  IMAGE_RE.lastIndex = 0;
  result = result.replace(IMAGE_RE, (_full, _alt, p) => {
    const index = dedupMap.get(p);
    if (index === undefined) return _full;
    const fileName = p.replace(/^.*[/\\]/, '').replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '');
    return `[image${index + 1}](${fileName})`;
  });
  return result;
}

function getMimeType(ext: string): string {
  const mimeMap: Record<string, string> = {
    png: 'image/png',
    jpg: 'image/jpeg',
    jpeg: 'image/jpeg',
    gif: 'image/gif',
    webp: 'image/webp',
    bmp: 'image/bmp',
    svg: 'image/svg+xml'
  };
  return mimeMap[ext] || 'image/png';
}

export function parseMarkdownFile(mdUri: vscode.Uri): ParseResult {
  const content = fs.readFileSync(mdUri.fsPath, 'utf-8');
  const trimmed = content.trim();
  if (!trimmed) {
    throw new Error('内容为空');
  }

  const refs = parseMarkdownImages(content);
  const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
  const { dataUris, dedupMap, errors } = resolveAndValidateImages(refs, mdDir);

  if (errors.length > 0) {
    throw new Error(`参考图读取失败：\n${errors.join('\n')}`);
  }

  const replaced = replaceImageRefs(content, dedupMap);

  return {
    finalPrompt: replaced,
    referenceImages: dataUris.map((dataUri, i) => ({
      index: i,
      dataUri,
      originalPath: refs.filter((r, idx) => refs.findIndex(r2 => r2.path === r.path) === idx)[i]?.path || ''
    }))
  };
}
```

- [ ] **Step 1: 创建 src/apiClient.ts**

```typescript
import { ApiGenerateResponse, ApiResultResponse } from './shared';

const TIMEOUT_MS = 30_000;

function controller(): AbortController {
  const c = new AbortController();
  setTimeout(() => c.abort(), TIMEOUT_MS);
  return c;
}

// gpt-image-2-vip 像素换算表
export const VIP_PIXELS: Record<string, Record<string, string>> = {
  '1:1': { '1K': '1024x1024', '2K': '2048x2048', '4K': '2880x2880' },
  '16:9': { '1K': '1792x1024', '2K': '2688x1536', '4K': '3840x2160' },
  '9:16': { '1K': '1024x1792', '2K': '1536x2688', '4K': '2160x3840' },
  '4:3': { '1K': '1536x1152', '2K': '2304x1728', '4K': '3456x2592' },
  '3:4': { '1K': '864x1152', '2K': '1728x2304', '4K': '2592x3456' }
};

export function getAspectRatioValue(
  model: string, aspectRatio: string, imageSize: string
): { aspectRatio?: string; imageSize?: string } {
  if (model.startsWith('nano-banana')) {
    return { aspectRatio, imageSize };
  }
  if (model === 'gpt-image-2') {
    return { aspectRatio };
  }
  if (model === 'gpt-image-2-vip') {
    const pixels = VIP_PIXELS[aspectRatio]?.[imageSize] || '864x1152';
    return { aspectRatio: pixels };
  }
  return { aspectRatio, imageSize };
}

export interface GenerateRequest {
  baseUrl: string;
  apiKey: string;
  model: string;
  prompt: string;
  images: string[];
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  replyType: 'json' | 'async';
}

export async function submitGenerate(req: GenerateRequest): Promise<string> {
  const body: Record<string, unknown> = {
    model: req.model,
    prompt: req.prompt,
    images: req.images,
    replyType: req.replyType
  };

  const sizeFields = getAspectRatioValue(req.model, req.aspectRatio, req.imageSize);
  if (sizeFields.aspectRatio) body.aspectRatio = sizeFields.aspectRatio;
  if (sizeFields.imageSize) body.imageSize = sizeFields.imageSize;

  const resp = await fetch(`${req.baseUrl}/v1/api/generate`, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: {
      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      'Authorization': `Bearer ${req.apiKey}`
    },
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
    signal: controller().signal
  });

  if (!resp.ok) {
    throw new Error(`API 返回 HTTP ${resp.status}`);
  }

  const data: ApiGenerateResponse = await resp.json();
  if (!data.id || data.status === 'failed' || data.status === 'violation') {
    throw new Error(data.error || `生成提交失败：${data.status || '无 id'}`);
  }

  return data.id;
}

export async function pollResult(baseUrl: string, apiKey: string, jobId: string): Promise<ApiResultResponse> {
  const url = `${baseUrl}/v1/api/result?id=${encodeURIComponent(jobId)}`;
  const resp = await fetch(url, {
    headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiKey}` },
    signal: controller().signal
  });

  if (!resp.ok) {
    throw new Error(`查询 API 返回 HTTP ${resp.status}`);
  }

  const data: ApiResultResponse = await resp.json();
  return data;
}

export async function downloadImage(url: string, destPath: string): Promise<void> {
  const resp = await fetch(url, { signal: controller().signal });
  if (!resp.ok) {
    throw new Error(`下载图片 HTTP ${resp.status}`);
  }
  const buffer = Buffer.from(await resp.arrayBuffer());
  const fs = await import('fs');
  fs.writeFileSync(destPath, buffer);
}
```
````

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import { UserConfig } from './shared';

export class ConfigManager {
  private static GLOBAL_KEY = 'image-flow.config';

  constructor(private secrets: vscode.SecretStorage, private globalState: vscode.Memento) {}

  async getApiKey(): Promise<string> {
    return (await this.secrets.get('image-flow.apiKey')) || '';
  }

  async setApiKey(value: string): Promise<void> {
    if (value) {
      await this.secrets.store('image-flow.apiKey', value);
    } else {
      await this.secrets.delete('image-flow.apiKey');
    }
  }

  getAll(): UserConfig {
    const saved = this.globalState.get<Partial<UserConfig>>(ConfigManager.GLOBAL_KEY) || {};
    return {
      apiKey: '', // 不返回明文
      baseUrl: saved.baseUrl || 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn',
      model: saved.model || 'nano-banana-2',
      aspectRatio: saved.aspectRatio || '3:4',
      imageSize: saved.imageSize || '1K',
      concurrency: saved.concurrency || 1,
      workbenchCols: saved.workbenchCols || 4,
      tasksCols: saved.tasksCols || 2,
      modelInjections: saved.modelInjections || {}
    };
  }

  async update(key: keyof UserConfig, value: unknown): Promise<void> {
    if (key === 'apiKey') {
      await this.setApiKey(value as string);
      return;
    }
    const saved = this.globalState.get<Partial<UserConfig>>(ConfigManager.GLOBAL_KEY) || {};
    (saved as Record<string, unknown>)[key] = value;
    await this.globalState.update(ConfigManager.GLOBAL_KEY, saved);
  }
}
```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import { ConfigManager } from './config';
import { ExtMessage, WebviewMessage, UserConfig, TaskState, HistoryEntry, MaterialLib } from './shared';

export class SidebarProvider implements vscode.WebviewViewProvider {
  private _view?: vscode.WebviewView;

  constructor(
    private readonly extensionUri: vscode.Uri,
    private readonly configManager: ConfigManager
  ) {}

  resolveWebviewView(webviewView: vscode.WebviewView): void {
    this._view = webviewView;

    webviewView.webview.options = {
      enableScripts: true,
      localResourceRoots: [vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.extensionUri, 'media')]
    };

    webviewView.webview.html = this.getHtml(webviewView.webview);

    webviewView.webview.onDidReceiveMessage(async (msg: WebviewMessage) => {
      switch (msg.type) {
        case 'init':
          await this.pushInit();
          break;
        case 'setApiKey':
          await this.configManager.setApiKey(msg.value);
          break;
        case 'setConfig':
          await this.configManager.update(msg.key as keyof UserConfig, msg.value);
          await this.pushConfig();
          break;
        case 'generate':
          await vscode.commands.executeCommand('image-flow.generateImage');
          break;
        case 'preview':
          await vscode.commands.executeCommand('image-flow.previewRequest');
          break;
        case 'openUrl':
          vscode.env.openExternal(vscode.Uri.parse(msg.url));
          break;
        case 'insertImage':
        case 'openImage':
        case 'addLib':
        case 'removeLib':
          // M4 实现
          break;
      }
    });
  }

  postMessage(msg: ExtMessage): void {
    this._view?.webview.postMessage(msg);
  }

  pushTasks(tasks: TaskState[], history: HistoryEntry[] = []): void {
    this.postMessage({ type: 'taskUpdate', tasks, history });
  }

  pushStatus(text: string, isError: boolean): void {
    this.postMessage({ type: 'statusMessage', text, isError });
  }

  private async pushInit(): Promise<void> {
    const config = this.configManager.getAll();
    const activeEditor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
    const activeMd = activeEditor?.document.uri.fsPath.endsWith('.md')
      ? activeEditor.document.uri.fsPath : '';

    this.postMessage({
      type: 'init',
      activeMd,
      config,
      tasks: [],
      history: [],
      materialLibs: []
    });
  }

  private async pushConfig(): Promise<void> {
    const config = this.configManager.getAll();
    this.postMessage({ type: 'configUpdate', config });
  }

  private getHtml(webview: vscode.Webview): string {
    const nonce = getNonce();
    const scriptUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.js')
    );
    const styleUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.css')
    );

    return `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy"
        content="default-src 'none'; img-src ${webview.cspSource} data:; script-src 'nonce-${nonce}'; style-src ${webview.cspSource} 'unsafe-inline';">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="${styleUri}">
</head>
<body>
  <div id="root"></div>
  <script nonce="${nonce}" src="${scriptUri}"></script>
</body>
</html>`;
  }
}

function getNonce(): string {
  let text = '';
  const possible = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789';
  for (let i = 0; i < 32; i++) {
    text += possible.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * possible.length));
  }
  return text;
}

```

```typescript
// ========== 消息类型（extension ↔ webview） ==========

export type ExtMessage =
  | { type: 'init'; activeMd: string; config: UserConfig; tasks: TaskState[]; history: HistoryEntry[]; materialLibs: MaterialLib[] }
  | { type: 'configUpdate'; config: UserConfig }
  | { type: 'taskUpdate'; tasks: TaskState[]; history: HistoryEntry[] }
  | { type: 'statusMessage'; text: string; isError: boolean }
  | { type: 'activeMdUpdate'; activeMd: string; materialLibs: MaterialLib[]; history?: HistoryEntry[] };

export type WebviewMessage =
  | { type: 'init' }
  | { type: 'setApiKey'; value: string }
  | { type: 'setConfig'; key: string; value: unknown }
  | { type: 'generate' }
  | { type: 'preview' }
  | { type: 'insertImage'; imagePath: string; altText: string }
  | { type: 'openImage'; imagePath: string }
  | { type: 'addLib' }
  | { type: 'removeLib'; libPath: string };

// ========== 用户配置 ==========

export interface UserConfig {
  apiKey: string;           // 仅用于判断是否已设置，不传递明文
  baseUrl: string;
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number;
  workbenchCols: number;
  tasksCols: number;
  modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
}

// ========== 任务状态 ==========

export type JobStatus = 'submitting' | 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed';

export interface JobState {
  id: string;               // job id（submitting 时可空）
  status: JobStatus;
  progress: number;         // 0~100
  error: string;
  results: string[];        // 已下载本地图片路径
}

export interface TaskState {
  folderName: string;       // task-<timestamp>-<seq>
  model: string;
  mdFile: string;
  startTime: number;        // 真实开始时间戳 ms
  jobs: JobState[];
  downloadIndex: number;    // 下一个下载图片序号（任务内接续编号）
}

export interface HistoryEntry {
  folderName: string;
  imageCount: number;
  images: string[];         // 缩略图路径列表
}

export interface MaterialLib {
  name: string;
  path: string;
  isManual: boolean;
  images: string[];
}

// ========== 解析结果 ==========

export interface ParseResult {
  finalPrompt: string;
  referenceImages: { index: number; dataUri: string; originalPath: string }[];
}

// ========== API 响应类型（运行时校验用） ==========

export interface ApiGenerateResponse {
  id?: string;
  status?: string;
  results?: { url?: string }[];
  progress?: number;
  error?: string;
}

export type ApiResultResponse = ApiGenerateResponse;
```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { parseMarkdownFile } from './markdownParser';
import { submitGenerate } from './apiClient';
import { ConfigManager } from './config';
import { SidebarProvider } from './sidebarProvider';

export function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {
  const configManager = new ConfigManager(context.secrets, context.globalState);
  const sidebarProvider = new SidebarProvider(context.extensionUri, configManager);

  // 注册侧栏
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.window.registerWebviewViewProvider('image-flow.sidebar', sidebarProvider)
  );

  // 生成命令
  const genCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.generateImage', async (uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
    const mdUri = uri || vscode.window.activeTextEditor?.document.uri;
    if (!mdUri || !mdUri.fsPath.endsWith('.md')) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请选中一个 Markdown 文件');
      return;
    }

    const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('image-flow');
    const apiKey = await context.secrets.get('image-flow.apiKey');
    if (!apiKey) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先设置 API Key（侧栏设置页）');
      return;
    }

    try {
      // 解析 Markdown
      const parsed = parseMarkdownFile(mdUri);

      // 组装请求体
      const model = config.get<string>('model', 'nano-banana-2');
      const baseUrl = config.get<string>('baseUrl', 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn');
      const aspectRatio = config.get<string>('aspectRatio', '3:4');
      const imageSize = config.get<string>('imageSize', '1K');
      const concurrency = config.get<number>('concurrency', 1);

      const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);

      // 创建任务文件夹
      const now = new Date();
      const ts = `${String(now.getFullYear()).slice(2)}${pad(now.getMonth() + 1)}${pad(now.getDate())}${pad(now.getHours())}${pad(now.getMinutes())}${pad(now.getSeconds())}`;
      const taskFolder = findAvailableTaskFolder(mdDir, ts);
      fs.mkdirSync(path.join(mdDir, taskFolder), { recursive: true });

      const images = parsed.referenceImages.map(r => r.dataUri);

      // 并发提交 N 个请求（M1 用同步 json 模式）
      const promises: Promise<string>[] = [];
      for (let i = 0; i < concurrency; i++) {
        promises.push(submitGenerate({
          baseUrl, apiKey, model,
          prompt: parsed.finalPrompt,
          images,
          aspectRatio, imageSize,
          replyType: 'json'
        }));
      }

      const results = await Promise.allSettled(promises);
      const failures: string[] = [];

      for (const result of results) {
        if (result.status === 'rejected') {
          failures.push(String(result.reason));
          continue;
        }
      }

      if (failures.length === concurrency) {
        // 全部失败：删除空文件夹
        try { fs.rmdirSync(path.join(mdDir, taskFolder)); } catch { /* ignore */ }
        throw new Error([...new Set(failures)].join('\n'));
      }

      vscode.window.showInformationMessage(`生成完成，任务文件夹：${taskFolder}`);
    } catch (e) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)}`);
    }
  });

  // 预览命令（M5 实现，先占位）
  const previewCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', async () => {
    vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览功能将在 M5 实现');
  });

  context.subscriptions.push(genCmd, previewCmd);
}

export function deactivate() {}

function pad(n: number): string {
  return String(n).padStart(2, '0');
}

function findAvailableTaskFolder(mdDir: string, ts: string): string {
  let seq = 1;
  while (true) {
    const name = `task-${ts}-${seq}`;
    if (!fs.existsSync(path.join(mdDir, name))) return name;
    seq++;
  }
}

```

```typescript
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { vscode } from './vscode';
import { ExtMessage, UserConfig, TaskState, HistoryEntry } from './shared';
import { WorkbenchTab } from './components/WorkbenchTab';
import { TasksTab } from './components/TasksTab';
import { SettingsTab } from './components/SettingsTab';

type TabName = 'workbench' | 'tasks' | 'settings';

export const App: React.FC = () => {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<TabName>('workbench');
  const [config, setConfig] = useState<UserConfig | null>(null);
  const [activeMd, setActiveMd] = useState('');
  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState<TaskState[]>([]);
  const [history, setHistory] = useState<HistoryEntry[]>([]);
  const [statusText, setStatusText] = useState('');
  const [statusIsError, setStatusIsError] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = (e: MessageEvent<ExtMessage>) => {
      const msg = e.data;
      switch (msg.type) {
        case 'init':
          setConfig(msg.config);
          setActiveMd(msg.activeMd);
          setTasks(msg.tasks);
          setHistory(msg.history);
          break;
        case 'configUpdate':
          setConfig(msg.config);
          break;
        case 'taskUpdate':
          setTasks(msg.tasks);
          setHistory(msg.history);
          break;
        case 'statusMessage':
          setStatusText(msg.text);
          setStatusIsError(msg.isError);
          setTimeout(() => { setStatusText(''); setStatusIsError(false); }, 5000);
          break;
      }
    };
    window.addEventListener('message', handler);
    vscode.postMessage({ type: 'init' });
    return () => window.removeEventListener('message', handler);
  }, []);

  const tabs: { id: TabName; label: string }[] = [
    { id: 'workbench', label: '工作台' },
    { id: 'tasks', label: '任务' },
    { id: 'settings', label: '设置' }
  ];

  return (
    <div className="app">
      <div className="tab-bar">
        {tabs.map(t => (
          <button
            key={t.id}
            className={`tab-btn ${activeTab === t.id ? 'active' : ''}`}
            onClick={() => setActiveTab(t.id)}
          >
            {t.label}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>
      <div className="tab-content">
        {activeTab === 'workbench' && config && (
          <WorkbenchTab config={config} activeMd={activeMd} statusText={statusText} statusIsError={statusIsError} />
        )}
        {activeTab === 'tasks' && (
          <TasksTab tasks={tasks} history={history} tasksCols={config?.tasksCols || 2} />
        )}
        {activeTab === 'settings' && config && (
          <SettingsTab config={config} />
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

```

```typescript
import React from 'react';
import { vscode } from '../vscode';
import { UserConfig } from '../shared';

interface Props {
  config: UserConfig;
  activeMd: string;
  statusText: string;
  statusIsError: boolean;
}

export const WorkbenchTab: React.FC<Props> = ({ config, activeMd, statusText, statusIsError }) => {
  const mdDisplay = activeMd ? activeMd.replace(/^.*[/\\]/, '') : '未打开 Markdown 文件';

  return (
    <div className="workbench-tab">
      {/* 素材库区 — M4 填充 */}
      <div className="material-section">
        <p className="placeholder-text">素材库将在 M4 实现</p>
      </div>

      {/* 底部停靠区 */}
      <div className="controls-section">
        <div className="controls-row">
          <div className="control-item">
            <label>模型</label>
            <select
              value={config.model}
              onChange={e => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'setConfig', key: 'model', value: e.target.value })}
            >
              <option value="nano-banana-2">nano-banana-2</option>
              <option value="nano-banana-pro">nano-banana-pro</option>
              <option value="gpt-image-2">gpt-image-2</option>
              <option value="gpt-image-2-vip">gpt-image-2-vip</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div className="control-item">
            <label>分辨率</label>
            <select
              value={config.imageSize}
              onChange={e => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'setConfig', key: 'imageSize', value: e.target.value })}
            >
              <option value="1K">1K</option>
              <option value="2K">2K</option>
              <option value="4K">4K</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div className="control-item">
            <label>比例</label>
            <select
              value={config.aspectRatio}
              onChange={e => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'setConfig', key: 'aspectRatio', value: e.target.value })}
            >
              <option value="1:1">1:1</option>
              <option value="16:9">16:9</option>
              <option value="9:16">9:16</option>
              <option value="4:3">4:3</option>
              <option value="3:4">3:4</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div className="control-item">
            <label>并发数</label>
            <input
              type="number" min={1} max={10}
              value={config.concurrency}
              onChange={e => {
                const v = Number(e.target.value);
                if (v >= 1 && v <= 10) {
                  vscode.postMessage({ type: 'setConfig', key: 'concurrency', value: v });
                }
              }}
            />
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="generate-row">
          <span className="md-name">{mdDisplay}</span>
          <button onClick={() => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'preview' })}>预览请求</button>
          <button onClick={() => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'generate' })}>生成</button>
        </div>

        {statusText && (
          <div className={`status-row ${statusIsError ? 'error' : ''}`}>
            {statusText}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

```
</details>

```typescript
import React from 'react';
import { TaskState, HistoryEntry } from '../shared';

interface Props {
  tasks: TaskState[];
  history: HistoryEntry[];
  tasksCols: number;
}

export const TasksTab: React.FC<Props> = ({ tasks, history, tasksCols }) => {
  if (tasks.length === 0 && history.length === 0) {
    return <p className="placeholder-text">暂无任务</p>;
  }

  return (
    <div className="tasks-tab">
      {/* M7 实现完整任务卡片 */}
      <p className="placeholder-text">任务列表将在 M3-M7 完善</p>
    </div>
  );
};
```

```typescript
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { vscode } from '../vscode';
import { UserConfig } from '../shared';

interface Props {
  config: UserConfig;
}

export const SettingsTab: React.FC<Props> = ({ config }) => {
  const [apiKey, setApiKey] = useState('');
  const [showKey, setShowKey] = useState(false);
  const [injectionModel, setInjectionModel] = useState(config.model);

  return (
    <div className="settings-tab">
      <section className="setting-group">
        <label className="setting-label">API Key</label>
        <div className="setting-row">
          <input
            type={showKey ? 'text' : 'password'}
            value={apiKey}
            onChange={e => setApiKey(e.target.value)}
            onBlur={() => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'setApiKey', value: apiKey })}
            placeholder="sk-..."
            className="setting-input"
          />
          <button onClick={() => setShowKey(!showKey)} className="icon-btn" type="button">
            {showKey ? '隐藏' : '显示'}
          </button>
          <button onClick={() => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'openUrl', url: 'https://grsai.ai/zh/dashboard/api-keys' })} className="link-btn" type="button">
            获取 API Key →
          </button>
        </div>
      </section>

      <section className="setting-group">
        <label className="setting-label">节点</label>
        <select
          value={config.baseUrl}
          onChange={e => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'setConfig', key: 'baseUrl', value: e.target.value })}
          className="setting-select"
        >
          <option value="https://grsai.dakka.com.cn">国内节点</option>
          <option value="https://grsaiapi.com">全球节点</option>
        </select>
      </section>

      <section className="setting-group">
        <label className="setting-label">工作台每行张数</label>
        <input
          type="number" min={1} max={8}
          value={config.workbenchCols}
          onChange={e => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'setConfig', key: 'workbenchCols', value: Number(e.target.value) })}
          className="setting-input"
        />
      </section>

      <section className="setting-group">
        <label className="setting-label">任务栏每行张数</label>
        <input
          type="number" min={1} max={8}
          value={config.tasksCols}
          onChange={e => vscode.postMessage({ type: 'setConfig', key: 'tasksCols', value: Number(e.target.value) })}
          className="setting-input"
        />
      </section>

      <section className="setting-group">
        <label className="setting-label">模型注入提示词</label>
        <select
          value={injectionModel}
          onChange={e => setInjectionModel(e.target.value)}
          className="setting-select"
        >
          <option value="nano-banana-2">nano-banana-2</option>
          <option value="nano-banana-pro">nano-banana-pro</option>
          <option value="gpt-image-2">gpt-image-2</option>
          <option value="gpt-image-2-vip">gpt-image-2-vip</option>
        </select>
        <textarea
          value={config.modelInjections[injectionModel] || ''}
          onChange={e => {
            const updated = { ...config.modelInjections, [injectionModel]: e.target.value };
            vscode.postMessage({ type: 'setConfig', key: 'modelInjections', value: updated });
          }}
          className="setting-textarea"
          rows={3}
          placeholder="该模型的注入提示词…"
        />
      </section>
    </div>
  );
};

```
</details>

```css
* { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
body {
  font-family: var(--vscode-font-family);
  font-size: var(--vscode-font-size);
  color: var(--vscode-foreground);
  background: var(--vscode-sideBar-background);
  padding: 0;
}

.app { display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100vh; }

/* 标签栏 */
.tab-bar { display: flex; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--vscode-panel-border); flex-shrink: 0; }
.tab-btn {
  flex: 1; padding: 8px; border: none; background: none;
  color: var(--vscode-foreground); cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px;
}
.tab-btn.active { border-bottom: 2px solid var(--vscode-focusBorder); color: var(--vscode-focusBorder); }
.tab-btn:hover { background: var(--vscode-list-hoverBackground); }
.tab-content { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 8px; }

/* 工作台 */
.controls-section { border-top: 1px solid var(--vscode-panel-border); padding-top: 8px; margin-top: 8px; }
.controls-row { display: flex; gap: 4px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
.control-item { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
.control-item label { display: block; font-size: 11px; margin-bottom: 2px; color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); }
.control-item select, .control-item input {
  width: 100%; padding: 4px;
  background: var(--vscode-input-background); color: var(--vscode-input-foreground);
  border: 1px solid var(--vscode-input-border); border-radius: 2px;
  font-family: var(--vscode-font-family); font-size: 12px;
}
.generate-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.generate-row .md-name {
  flex: 1; font-size: 12px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap;
  color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground);
}
.generate-row button {
  padding: 4px 12px; background: var(--vscode-button-background);
  color: var(--vscode-button-foreground); border: none; border-radius: 2px;
  cursor: pointer; font-size: 12px; white-space: nowrap;
}
.generate-row button:hover { background: var(--vscode-button-hoverBackground); }
.generate-row button:disabled { opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; }
.status-row { font-size: 12px; padding: 4px 0; }
.status-row.error { color: var(--vscode-errorForeground); }

/* 设置 */
.setting-group { margin-bottom: 12px; }
.setting-label { display: block; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.setting-row { display: flex; gap: 4px; align-items: center; }
.setting-input {
  padding: 4px; background: var(--vscode-input-background);
  color: var(--vscode-input-foreground); border: 1px solid var(--vscode-input-border);
  border-radius: 2px; flex: 1; font-family: var(--vscode-font-family); font-size: 12px;
}
.setting-select {
  width: 100%; padding: 4px; background: var(--vscode-input-background);
  color: var(--vscode-input-foreground); border: 1px solid var(--vscode-input-border);
  border-radius: 2px; font-family: var(--vscode-font-family); font-size: 12px;
}
.setting-textarea {
  width: 100%; padding: 4px; background: var(--vscode-input-background);
  color: var(--vscode-input-foreground); border: 1px solid var(--vscode-input-border);
  border-radius: 2px; resize: vertical; font-family: var(--vscode-font-family); font-size: 12px;
  margin-top: 4px;
}
.link-btn { background: none; border: none; color: var(--vscode-textLink-foreground); cursor: pointer; font-size: 12px; white-space: nowrap; }
.link-btn:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
.icon-btn {
  padding: 2px 8px; background: var(--vscode-button-secondaryBackground);
  color: var(--vscode-button-secondaryForeground); border: none; border-radius: 2px;
  cursor: pointer; font-size: 12px; white-space: nowrap;
}

.placeholder-text { padding: 16px; text-align: center; color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); font-style: italic; }

/* 素材库 */
.material-section { min-height: 60px; }

```

```typescript
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { vscode } from './vscode';
import { ExtMessage, UserConfig, TaskState, HistoryEntry } from './shared';
import { WorkbenchTab } from './components/WorkbenchTab';
import { TasksTab } from './components/TasksTab';
import { SettingsTab } from './components/SettingsTab';

type TabName = 'workbench' | 'tasks' | 'settings';

export const App: React.FC = () => {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<TabName>('workbench');
  const [config, setConfig] = useState<UserConfig | null>(null);
  const [activeMd, setActiveMd] = useState('');
  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState<TaskState[]>([]);
  const [history, setHistory] = useState<HistoryEntry[]>([]);
  const [statusText, setStatusText] = useState('');
  const [statusIsError, setStatusIsError] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = (e: MessageEvent<ExtMessage>) => {
      const msg = e.data;
      switch (msg.type) {
        case 'init':
          setConfig(msg.config);
          setActiveMd(msg.activeMd);
          setTasks(msg.tasks);
          setHistory(msg.history);
          break;
        case 'configUpdate':
          setConfig(msg.config);
          break;
        case 'taskUpdate':
          setTasks(msg.tasks);
          setHistory(msg.history);
          break;
        case 'statusMessage':
          setStatusText(msg.text);
          setStatusIsError(msg.isError);
          setTimeout(() => { setStatusText(''); setStatusIsError(false); }, 5000);
          break;
      }
    };
    window.addEventListener('message', handler);
    vscode.postMessage({ type: 'init' });
    return () => window.removeEventListener('message', handler);
  }, []);

  const tabs: { id: TabName; label: string }[] = [
    { id: 'workbench', label: '工作台' },
    { id: 'tasks', label: '任务' },
    { id: 'settings', label: '设置' }
  ];

  return (
    <div className="app">
      <div className="tab-bar">
        {tabs.map(t => (
          <button
            key={t.id}
            className={`tab-btn ${activeTab === t.id ? 'active' : ''}`}
            onClick={() => setActiveTab(t.id)}
          >
            {t.label}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>
      <div className="tab-content">
        {activeTab === 'workbench' && config && (
          <WorkbenchTab config={config} activeMd={activeMd} statusText={statusText} statusIsError={statusIsError} />
        )}
        {activeTab === 'tasks' && (
          <TasksTab tasks={tasks} history={history} />
        )}
        {activeTab === 'settings' && config && (
          <SettingsTab config={config} />
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};
```

```typescript
          break;

    };
```

```typescript
export const IMAGE_EXTENSIONS = ['png', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'gif', 'webp', 'bmp', 'svg'];

export function isImageExt(ext: string): boolean {
  return IMAGE_EXTENSIONS.includes(ext.toLowerCase());
}

export function extFromUrl(url: string): string {
  try {
    const pathname = new URL(url).pathname;
    const ext = pathname.split('.').pop()?.toLowerCase() || '';
    return isImageExt(ext) ? ext : 'png';
  } catch {
    return 'png';
  }
}

export function mimeFromExt(ext: string): string {
  const map: Record<string, string> = {
    png: 'image/png', jpg: 'image/jpeg', jpeg: 'image/jpeg',
    gif: 'image/gif', webp: 'image/webp', bmp: 'image/bmp', svg: 'image/svg+xml'
  };
  return map[ext] || 'image/png';
}
```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { TaskState, JobState } from './shared';
import { submitGenerate, pollResult, downloadImage, POLL_INTERVAL_MS, TASK_TIMEOUT_MS } from './apiClient';
import { extFromUrl } from './imageUtils';

export class TaskManager {
  private tasks: TaskState[] = [];
  private pollTimer: ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | null = null;
  private polling = false; // 重入锁
  private onUpdate?: (tasks: TaskState[]) => void;

  constructor(private globalState: vscode.Memento, private secrets: vscode.SecretStorage) {}

  setOnUpdate(cb: (tasks: TaskState[]) => void): void {
    this.onUpdate = cb;
  }

  getTasks(): TaskState[] {
    return this.tasks;
  }

  addTask(task: TaskState): void {
    this.tasks.unshift(task); // 新任务在前
    this.save();
    this.notify();
    this.ensurePolling();
  }

  removeTask(folderName: string): void {
    this.tasks = this.tasks.filter(t => t.folderName !== folderName);
    this.save();
    this.notify();
    if (this.tasks.length === 0) this.stopPolling();
  }

  async submitJobs(
    task: TaskState,
    baseUrl: string,
    apiKey: string,
    model: string,
    prompt: string,
    images: string[],
    aspectRatio: string,
    imageSize: string,
    concurrency: number
  ): Promise<void> {
    const jobPromises: Promise<void>[] = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < concurrency; i++) {
      const job: JobState = { id: '', status: 'submitting', progress: 0, error: '', results: [] };
      task.jobs.push(job);

      const p = submitGenerate({
        baseUrl, apiKey, model, prompt, images,
        aspectRatio, imageSize, replyType: 'async'
      }).then(jobId => {
        job.id = jobId;
        job.status = 'running';
        this.save();
        this.notify();
      }).catch(e => {
        job.status = 'failed';
        job.error = e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e);
        this.save();
        this.notify();
      });

      jobPromises.push(p);
    }

    this.save();
    this.notify();

    await Promise.allSettled(jobPromises);

    // 全部提交失败 → 作废任务
    if (task.jobs.every(j => j.status === 'failed')) {
      const errors = [...new Set(task.jobs.map(j => j.error).filter(Boolean))];
      this.removeTask(task.folderName);
      const mdDir = path.dirname(task.mdFile);
      try { fs.rmdirSync(path.join(mdDir, task.folderName)); } catch { /* empty */ }
      throw new Error(errors.join('\n'));
    }
  }

  private async poll(): Promise<void> {
    if (this.polling) return; // 重入锁
    this.polling = true;

    try {
      const apiKey = await this.secrets.get('image-flow.apiKey');
      if (!apiKey) return;

      const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('image-flow');
      const baseUrl = config.get<string>('baseUrl', 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn');

      for (const task of this.tasks) {
        const mdDir = path.dirname(task.mdFile);
        const taskDir = path.join(mdDir, task.folderName);
        const mdName = path.basename(task.mdFile, '.md');

        for (const job of task.jobs) {
          if (job.status !== 'running') continue;

          try {
            const result = await pollResult(baseUrl, apiKey, job.id);

            if (result.status === 'succeeded' && result.results) {
              // 下载结果图片，接续编号
              for (const r of result.results) {
                if (r.url) {
                  task.downloadIndex++;
                  const ext = extFromUrl(r.url);
                  const fileName = `${mdName}-${task.downloadIndex}.${ext}`;
                  const destPath = path.join(taskDir, fileName);
                  await downloadImage(r.url, destPath);
                  job.results.push(destPath);
                }
              }
              job.status = 'succeeded';
              job.progress = 100;
            } else if (result.status === 'failed' || result.status === 'violation') {
              job.status = 'failed';
              job.error = result.error || result.status;
            } else if (result.status === 'running') {
              job.progress = result.progress || 0;
            }
          } catch {
            // 瞬时错误静默，下轮重试（M8 完善分类）
          }
        }

        // 超时检查
        const now = Date.now();
        if (now - task.startTime > TASK_TIMEOUT_MS) {
          for (const job of task.jobs) {
            if (job.status === 'running' || job.status === 'submitting') {
              job.status = 'failed';
              job.error = '任务超时';
            }
          }
        }
      }

      // 清理已终结任务
      const toRemove: string[] = [];
      for (const task of this.tasks) {
        if (task.jobs.length > 0 && task.jobs.every(j => j.status === 'succeeded' || j.status === 'failed')) {
          const hasImages = task.jobs.some(j => j.results.length > 0);
          const failedJobs = task.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'failed');

          if (hasImages) {
            if (failedJobs.length > 0) {
              const errors = [...new Set(failedJobs.map(j => j.error).filter(Boolean))];
              vscode.window.showWarningMessage(
                `任务 ${task.folderName}：${task.jobs.length - failedJobs.length}/${task.jobs.length} 成功，${failedJobs.length} 失败`
              );
            }
          } else {
            // 无成图：错误通知 + 删除空文件夹
            const errors = [...new Set(failedJobs.map(j => j.error).filter(Boolean))];
            vscode.window.showErrorMessage(
              `任务 ${task.folderName}：全部生成失败${errors.length > 0 ? ' — ' + errors.join('；') : ''}`
            );
            try { fs.rmdirSync(path.join(path.dirname(task.mdFile), task.folderName)); } catch { /* empty */ }
          }
          toRemove.push(task.folderName);
        }
      }

      for (const name of toRemove) {
        this.tasks = this.tasks.filter(t => t.folderName !== name);
      }

      if (this.tasks.length === 0) this.stopPolling();

      this.save();
      this.notify();
    } finally {
      this.polling = false;
    }
  }

  resume(): void {
    // 从 globalState 恢复
    const saved = this.globalState.get<TaskState[]>('image-flow.tasks') || [];
    this.tasks = saved;

    // submitting 态无 id → 判失败（提交未完成）
    let hasRunning = false;
    for (const task of this.tasks) {
      for (const job of task.jobs) {
        if (job.status === 'submitting') {
          job.status = 'failed';
          job.error = '提交未完成';
        }
        if (job.status === 'running') hasRunning = true;
      }
    }

    // 超时计时按本次会话起算重置（关机时长不计入）
    // startTime 保留原始值用于 UI 已进行时长显示

    if (hasRunning) {
      this.ensurePolling();
      void this.poll(); // 立即拉一次
    }

    this.save();
    this.notify();
  }

  private ensurePolling(): void {
    if (!this.pollTimer) {
      this.pollTimer = setInterval(() => { void this.poll(); }, POLL_INTERVAL_MS);
    }
  }

  private stopPolling(): void {
    if (this.pollTimer) {
      clearInterval(this.pollTimer);
      this.pollTimer = null;
    }
  }

  private save(): void {
    void this.globalState.update('image-flow.tasks', this.tasks);
  }

  private notify(): void {
    this.onUpdate?.(this.getTasks());
  }
}

```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { parseMarkdownFile } from './markdownParser';
import { submitGenerate } from './apiClient';
import { ConfigManager } from './config';
import { SidebarProvider } from './sidebarProvider';

export function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {
  const configManager = new ConfigManager(context.secrets, context.globalState);
  const sidebarProvider = new SidebarProvider(context.extensionUri, configManager);

  // 注册侧栏
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.window.registerWebviewViewProvider('image-flow.sidebar', sidebarProvider)
  );

  // 生成命令
  const genCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.generateImage', async (uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
    const mdUri = uri || vscode.window.activeTextEditor?.document.uri;
    if (!mdUri || !mdUri.fsPath.endsWith('.md')) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请选中一个 Markdown 文件');
      return;
    }

    const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('image-flow');
    const apiKey = await context.secrets.get('image-flow.apiKey');
    if (!apiKey) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先设置 API Key（侧栏设置页）');
      return;
    }

    try {
      // 解析 Markdown
      const parsed = parseMarkdownFile(mdUri);

      // 组装请求体
      const model = config.get<string>('model', 'nano-banana-2');
      const baseUrl = config.get<string>('baseUrl', 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn');
      const aspectRatio = config.get<string>('aspectRatio', '3:4');
      const imageSize = config.get<string>('imageSize', '1K');
      const concurrency = config.get<number>('concurrency', 1);

      const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);

      // 创建任务文件夹
      const now = new Date();
      const ts = `${String(now.getFullYear()).slice(2)}${pad(now.getMonth() + 1)}${pad(now.getDate())}${pad(now.getHours())}${pad(now.getMinutes())}${pad(now.getSeconds())}`;
      const taskFolder = findAvailableTaskFolder(mdDir, ts);
      fs.mkdirSync(path.join(mdDir, taskFolder), { recursive: true });

      const images = parsed.referenceImages.map(r => r.dataUri);

      // 并发提交 N 个请求（M1 用同步 json 模式）
      const promises: Promise<string>[] = [];
      for (let i = 0; i < concurrency; i++) {
        promises.push(submitGenerate({
          baseUrl, apiKey, model,
          prompt: parsed.finalPrompt,
          images,
          aspectRatio, imageSize,
          replyType: 'json'
        }));
      }

      const results = await Promise.allSettled(promises);
      const failures: string[] = [];

      for (const result of results) {
        if (result.status === 'rejected') {
          failures.push(String(result.reason));
          continue;
        }
      }

      if (failures.length === concurrency) {
        // 全部失败：删除空文件夹
        try { fs.rmdirSync(path.join(mdDir, taskFolder)); } catch { /* ignore */ }
        throw new Error([...new Set(failures)].join('\n'));
      }

      vscode.window.showInformationMessage(`生成完成，任务文件夹：${taskFolder}`);
    } catch (e) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)}`);
    }
  });

  // 预览命令（M5 实现，先占位）
  const previewCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', async () => {
    vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览功能将在 M5 实现');
  });

  context.subscriptions.push(genCmd, previewCmd);
}

export function deactivate() {}

function pad(n: number): string {
  return String(n).padStart(2, '0');
}

function findAvailableTaskFolder(mdDir: string, ts: string): string {
  let seq = 1;
  while (true) {
    const name = `task-${ts}-${seq}`;
    if (!fs.existsSync(path.join(mdDir, name))) return name;
    seq++;
  }
}
```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { parseMarkdownFile } from './markdownParser';
import { ConfigManager } from './config';
import { SidebarProvider } from './sidebarProvider';
import { TaskManager } from './taskManager';
import { TaskState } from './shared';

let taskManager: TaskManager;

export function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {
  const configManager = new ConfigManager(context.secrets, context.globalState);
  const sidebarProvider = new SidebarProvider(context.extensionUri, configManager);
  taskManager = new TaskManager(context.globalState, context.secrets);

  // 任务状态变更 → 推 webview
  taskManager.setOnUpdate((tasks) => {
    sidebarProvider.pushTasks(tasks);
  });

  // 注册侧栏
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.window.registerWebviewViewProvider('image-flow.sidebar', sidebarProvider)
  );

  // 生成命令（异步模式）
  const genCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.generateImage', async (uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
    const mdUri = uri || vscode.window.activeTextEditor?.document.uri;
    if (!mdUri || !mdUri.fsPath.endsWith('.md')) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请选中一个 Markdown 文件');
      return;
    }

    const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('image-flow');
    const apiKey = await context.secrets.get('image-flow.apiKey');
    if (!apiKey) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先设置 API Key（侧栏设置页）');
      return;
    }

    try {
      const parsed = parseMarkdownFile(mdUri);

      const model = config.get<string>('model', 'nano-banana-2');
      const baseUrl = config.get<string>('baseUrl', 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn');
      const aspectRatio = config.get<string>('aspectRatio', '3:4');
      const imageSize = config.get<string>('imageSize', '1K');
      const concurrency = config.get<number>('concurrency', 1);

      const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);

      // 创建任务文件夹
      const now = new Date();
      const ts = `${String(now.getFullYear()).slice(2)}${pad(now.getMonth() + 1)}${pad(now.getDate())}${pad(now.getHours())}${pad(now.getMinutes())}${pad(now.getSeconds())}`;
      const taskFolder = findAvailableTaskFolder(mdDir, ts);
      fs.mkdirSync(path.join(mdDir, taskFolder), { recursive: true });

      const task: TaskState = {
        folderName: taskFolder,
        model,
        mdFile: mdUri.fsPath,
        startTime: Date.now(),
        jobs: [],
        downloadIndex: 0
      };

      // 先建卡入列，后台异步提交
      taskManager.addTask(task);

      taskManager.submitJobs(
        task, baseUrl, apiKey, model,
        parsed.finalPrompt,
        parsed.referenceImages.map(r => r.dataUri),
        aspectRatio, imageSize, concurrency
      ).catch(e => {
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成提交失败：${e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)}`);
      });

      // 侧栏切到任务页
      vscode.commands.executeCommand('image-flow.sidebar.focus');

    } catch (e) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)}`);
    }
  });

  // 预览命令（M5 实现）
  const previewCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', async () => {
    vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览功能将在 M5 实现');
  });

  context.subscriptions.push(genCmd, previewCmd);

  // 重启续拉
  taskManager.resume();
}

export function deactivate() {}

function pad(n: number): string {
  return String(n).padStart(2, '0');
}

function findAvailableTaskFolder(mdDir: string, ts: string): string {
  let seq = 1;
  while (true) {
    const name = `task-${ts}-${seq}`;
    if (!fs.existsSync(path.join(mdDir, name))) return name;
    seq++;
  }
}

```
</details>

```typescript
    const config = this.configManager.getAll();

    const activeMd = activeEditor?.document.uri.fsPath.endsWith('.md')
      ? activeEditor.document.uri.fsPath : '';

    this.postMessage({

      activeMd,
      config,
      tasks: [],
      history: [],
      materialLibs: []
    });
```

```typescript
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { vscode } from './vscode';
import { ExtMessage, UserConfig, TaskState, HistoryEntry } from './shared';
import { WorkbenchTab } from './components/WorkbenchTab';
import { TasksTab } from './components/TasksTab';
import { SettingsTab } from './components/SettingsTab';

type TabName = 'workbench' | 'tasks' | 'settings';

export const App: React.FC = () => {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<TabName>('workbench');
  const [config, setConfig] = useState<UserConfig | null>(null);
  const [activeMd, setActiveMd] = useState('');
  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState<TaskState[]>([]);
  const [history, setHistory] = useState<HistoryEntry[]>([]);
  const [statusText, setStatusText] = useState('');
  const [statusIsError, setStatusIsError] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = (e: MessageEvent<ExtMessage>) => {
      const msg = e.data;
      switch (msg.type) {
        case 'init':
          setConfig(msg.config);
          setActiveMd(msg.activeMd);
          setTasks(msg.tasks);
          setHistory(msg.history);
          break;
        case 'configUpdate':
          setConfig(msg.config);
          break;
        case 'taskUpdate':
          setTasks(msg.tasks);
          setHistory(msg.history);
          break;
        case 'statusMessage':
          setStatusText(msg.text);
          setStatusIsError(msg.isError);
          setTimeout(() => { setStatusText(''); setStatusIsError(false); }, 5000);
          break;
      }
    };
    window.addEventListener('message', handler);
    vscode.postMessage({ type: 'init' });
    return () => window.removeEventListener('message', handler);
  }, []);

  const tabs: { id: TabName; label: string }[] = [
    { id: 'workbench', label: '工作台' },
    { id: 'tasks', label: '任务' },
    { id: 'settings', label: '设置' }
  ];

  // 始终渲染所有标签页，用 display 控制显隐以保留内部状态（§8.1）
  return (
    <div className="app">
      <div className="tab-bar">
        {tabs.map(t => (
          <button
            key={t.id}
            className={`tab-btn ${activeTab === t.id ? 'active' : ''}`}
            onClick={() => setActiveTab(t.id)}
          >
            {t.label}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>
      <div className="tab-content">
        <div style={{ display: activeTab === 'workbench' ? 'block' : 'none' }}>
          {config && (
            <WorkbenchTab config={config} activeMd={activeMd} statusText={statusText} statusIsError={statusIsError} />
          )}
        </div>
        <div style={{ display: activeTab === 'tasks' ? 'block' : 'none' }}>
          <TasksTab tasks={tasks} history={history} />
        </div>
        <div style={{ display: activeTab === 'settings' ? 'block' : 'none' }}>
          {config && <SettingsTab config={config} />}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

```
</details>

> Base directory for this skill: /home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-superpowers-260611192131/.claude-home/skills/executing-plans
> 
> # Executing Plans
> 
> ## Overview
> 
> Load plan, review critically, execute all tasks, report when complete.
> 
> **Announce at start:** "I'm using the executing-plans skill to implement this plan."
> 
> **Note:** Tell your human partner that Superpowers works much better with access to subagents. The quality of its work will be significantly higher if run on a platform with subagent support (such as Claude Code or Codex). If subagents are available, use superpowers:subagent-driven-development instead of this skill.
> 
> ## The Process
> 
> ### Step 1: Load and Review Plan
> 1. Read plan file
> 2. Review critically - identify any questions or concerns about the plan
> 3. If concerns: Raise them with your human partner before starting
> 4. If no concerns: Create TodoWrite and proceed
> 
> ### Step 2: Execute Tasks
> 
> For each task:
> 1. Mark as in_progress
> 2. Follow each step exactly (plan has bite-sized steps)
> 3. Run verifications as specified
> 4. Mark as completed
> 
> ### Step 3: Complete Development
> 
> After all tasks complete and verified:
> - Announce: "I'm using the finishing-a-development-branch skill to complete this work."
> - **REQUIRED SUB-SKILL:** Use superpowers:finishing-a-development-branch
> - Follow that skill to verify tests, present options, execute choice
> 
> ## When to Stop and Ask for Help
> 
> **STOP executing immediately when:**
> - Hit a blocker (missing dependency, test fails, instruction unclear)
> - Plan has critical gaps preventing starting
> - You don't understand an instruction
> - Verification fails repeatedly
> 
> **Ask for clarification rather than guessing.**
> 
> ## When to Revisit Earlier Steps
>

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { IMAGE_EXTENSIONS } from './imageUtils';
import { MaterialLib } from './shared';

export class MaterialLibraryManager {
  private static MANUAL_KEY = 'image-flow.manualLibraries';

  constructor(private workspaceState: vscode.Memento) {}

  getManualLibPaths(): string[] {
    return this.workspaceState.get<string[]>(MaterialLibraryManager.MANUAL_KEY) || [];
  }

  async addManualLib(): Promise<void> {
    const folders = await vscode.window.showOpenDialog({
      canSelectFolders: true,
      canSelectMany: false,
      openLabel: '添加素材库'
    });
    if (!folders || folders.length === 0) return;

    const newPath = folders[0].fsPath;
    const existing = this.getManualLibPaths();
    if (existing.includes(newPath)) return; // 去重

    existing.push(newPath);
    await this.workspaceState.update(MaterialLibraryManager.MANUAL_KEY, existing);
  }

  async removeManualLib(libPath: string): Promise<void> {
    const existing = this.getManualLibPaths();
    const idx = existing.indexOf(libPath);
    if (idx >= 0) {
      existing.splice(idx, 1);
      await this.workspaceState.update(MaterialLibraryManager.MANUAL_KEY, existing);
    }
  }

  scanManualLibs(): MaterialLib[] {
    return this.getManualLibPaths().map(libPath => ({
      name: path.basename(libPath),
      path: libPath,
      isManual: true,
      images: this.scanImages(libPath, 3, 500)
    }));
  }

  scanAutoLibs(mdUri: vscode.Uri | undefined, workspaceRoot: string | undefined): MaterialLib[] {
    if (!mdUri || !workspaceRoot) return [];
    const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);

    // 确保 MD 在工作区内
    if (!mdDir.startsWith(workspaceRoot)) return [];

    const libs: MaterialLib[] = [];
    let current = mdDir;

    // 从 MD 所在目录逐层向上到工作区根的下一层（不含根那层）
    while (current !== workspaceRoot) {
      const images: string[] = [];
      try {
        const entries = fs.readdirSync(current, { withFileTypes: true });
        for (const entry of entries) {
          if (entry.isFile() && IMAGE_EXTENSIONS.includes(path.extname(entry.name).toLowerCase().slice(1))) {
            images.push(path.join(current, entry.name));
          }
        }
      } catch { /* skip inaccessible dirs */ }

      if (images.length > 0) {
        const relativePath = path.relative(workspaceRoot, current);
        libs.push({
          name: relativePath || path.basename(current),
          path: current,
          isManual: false,
          images
        });
      }

      current = path.dirname(current);
    }

    return libs; // 从 MD 目录向上，已经是从近到远
  }

  getAllLibs(mdUri: vscode.Uri | undefined): MaterialLib[] {
    const workspaceRoot = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri.fsPath;
    const autoLibs = this.scanAutoLibs(mdUri, workspaceRoot);
    const manualLibs = this.scanManualLibs();
    return [...autoLibs, ...manualLibs];
  }

  /** 递归扫描图片，depth 为剩余层数，maxItems 为上限 */
  private scanImages(root: string, depth: number, maxItems: number): string[] {
    if (depth < 0) return [];
    const results: string[] = [];
    try {
      const entries = fs.readdirSync(root, { withFileTypes: true });
      for (const entry of entries) {
        if (results.length >= maxItems) break;
        const fullPath = path.join(root, entry.name);
        if (entry.isFile() && IMAGE_EXTENSIONS.includes(path.extname(entry.name).toLowerCase().slice(1))) {
          results.push(fullPath);
        } else if (entry.isDirectory()) {
          results.push(...this.scanImages(fullPath, depth - 1, maxItems - results.length));
        }
      }
    } catch { /* skip inaccessible */ }
    return results;
  }
}

```
